programme.title: The Lookout

programme.title: The Machinist
programme.desc: Trevor hasn't slept in a year. When notes turn up in his home and hallucinations cause an injury, he tries to find out if there is a plot to drive him mad or his fatigue has robbed him of reason.

programme.desc: A prostitute (Pam Grier) and a revolutionary (Margaret Markov) escape from a Philippine woman's prison. Disguised as nuns and chained together, they head into the jungle, pursued by local police, and a small-time kingpin enlisted to bring them back.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: Donna celebra un hito con sus aliados más íntimos. Cameron considera decir adiós. Joe se enfrenta a un futuro incierto.

programme.desc: La llegada de Jey a la casa revive pasiones olvidadas en Jacky. Una nueva invitada llega con la intención de sabotear la relación entre Rocío y Santiago, mientras que dos invitadas deciden dejar la casa.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: El cumpleaños de Beni se descontrola, y Rocío acaba en un fuerte enfrentamiento. Isa recibe una llamada que la lleva a tomar una decisión inesperada, mientras que Alba y Altafulla logran reconciliarse.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Un juego sexual trae consecuencias negativas para Santiago y Rocío. Alba y Karime hacen oficial su compromiso. Chile cumple su promesa, y los rumores llevan a José y Santiago a un enfrentamiento.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Las vacaciones llegan a su fin y algunos invitados se despiden de la casa, mientras que una persona especial llega de sorpresa. Todos se preparan para la fiesta, pero para algunos, será la peor noche de sus vidas.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La fiesta final da inicio y los conflictos surgen de inmediato. Mientras algunos se divierten, otros ven cómo sus relaciones llegan a su fin. Poco a poco, todos comienzan a despedirse de la casa, marcando el cierre de unas vacaciones inolvidables.

programme.desc: Forte comes back after a long mission, only to find that everyone believes she is dead! Apparently, Ranpha used Forte's "death" as an excuse for missing her date with a guy she likes, letting the situation go out of hand.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: The Angels' new mission is capturing a runaway sentient tank. Milfeulle and Mint get on the tank as it rampages in the city. Has the sentient tank developed feelings of friendship for the two girls? Can the Angels successfully stop it?

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: Forte destroys her engine after pushing it too hard without breaking it in. Forte, Mint, and Vanilla find the nearest space station in an attempt to try to get Forte's engine repaired.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: Lucky Milfeulle wins a free dinner at a fancy restaurant and brings Normad along as a date to teach her table manners. On the way there, they chance upon a pastry stall and Milfeulle is impressed with the delicious pastries.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: The military plane that Mint and Forte were traveling in crashes, stranding them on a deserted island. Mint and Forte team up with the island's sole resident Max to find ways to call for help.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: Ranpha, Mint, and Vanilla go to a pizzeria that is open in late-night hours. However, the pizzeria is unexpectedly closed. Ranpha does not believe it and sneaks in.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: During the search for the lost technology, Mint gets stuck in a cutboard figure on top of the mountain viewing area. Meanwhile the mountain is sinking into the sea.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: The Angels are approached by Mr. God, a retired comedian who tries to make Vanilla laugh. He failed to do so in his last show despite everyone else laughing, resulting in an accident.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: The human race is being attacked by its mysterious arch-enemy, a giant dice named Kyutaro. As the Angels try to attack Kyutaro, the dice is invulnerable to any human attack and easily defeats the Angels.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: The Angels are filing their expense reports when the Commander informs them that the Milfeulle who has been with them all this time is a fake.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: The Angel's (last) mission is escorting the mysterious client Johnny in a truck through a desert wilderness. As each Angel takes turns to drive, Ranpha becomes jealous as she loses to other Angels in deciding who goes next.

programme.desc: On the road to Megalopolis, Tetsuro is encountered by Count Mecha and watches as his mother is killed.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999 Series

programme.desc: Tetsuro is rescued from a ghost by Claire, a waitress they met. But in doing so, Claire is blasted into a million pieces.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999 Series

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999 Series

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999 Series
programme.desc: The 999 has to make an emergency stop at Fossilized Planet, a place petrified all the way to the tracks. Tetsuro is curious about the fossils and leaves the 999.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw and Anita Manning continue their antique adventure with Anita in the lead, having won the first auction. Can Paul catch her up as they go from the steel city of Sheffield, heading for auction in Luddendenfoot, West Yorkshire?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's an auction apiece for Paul Laidlaw and Anita Manning as they reach the halfway point of their Antiques Road Trip. This leg sees them begin in South Cave in the East Riding of Yorkshire, aiming for auction in Twickenham, London.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw and Anita Manning head for round four at auction and they both have their eyes on the prize. Starting out in Navenby, Lincolnshire they make their way towards the penultimate auction in the Norfolk town of Diss.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the final leg for road trippers Paul Laidlaw and Anita Manning. There are only a few pounds separating this competitive duo as they begin in Norwich, and head for a nail-biting final auction in Stamford, Licolnshire.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antique experts Christina Trevanion and Paul Laidlaw kick off a new season in Suffolk and Cambridgeshire. Armed with £200 each, and an ailing pickup truck, they shop up a storm before heading to an auction in Market Harborough.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques hunters Christina Trevanion and Paul Laidlaw shop across Gloucestershire and Northamptonshire before going head-to-head at an auction in Evesham, Worcestershire.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Travelling through Hertfordshire, Buckinghamshire, and the West Midlands, Paul Laidlaw uncovers a hidden gem that could win him the trip. All is revealed when he and Christina Trevanion auction their lots in Nantwich, Cheshire.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Christina Trevanion and Paul Laidlaw travel through Shropshire and Worcestershire. Paul gets security clearance to visit Iron Mountain and Christina learns about the origins of the modern Olympic movement in Much Wenlock.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw and Christina Trevanion are taking in the delights of Staffordshire and Cheshire. Paul has had amazing success on this trip; can Christina catch up as they head towards their final auction in Northwich?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: New expert Raj Bisram joins the road trip. This auctioneer from Kent is taking on Charles Hanson as they shop around Berkshire, Wiltshire and Somerset, before heading to their first auction showdown in Winchcombe.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's leg two for auctioneers Charles Hanson and Raj Bisram, and they're taking their Triumph through Somerset, Dorset and Hampshire before ending at an auction in Swanmore.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Road Trip veteran Charles Hanson is halfway through a week of adventure with new recruit, Raj Bisram. The duelling auctioneers travel though Dorset and Somerset in their Triumph before heading for an auction in Bridgwater.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts David Harper and Anita Manning go head-to-head as they road trip through North England and into southern and central Scotland, heading to an auction in Knutsford, Cheshire.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: David Harper and Anita Manning travel through Yorkshire. Along the way, David learns about a 500-year-old mystery and Anita meets two inspirational Land Girls before they head towards the auction in Harrogate.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: From Clitheroe in Lancashire, Michael and the experts unearth a mix of treasures. Among them, a Victorian multi-purpose pen knife, a miniature theatre, and a Japanese lacquered chest.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael Aspel and the experts visit Winston Churchill's Kent home, where they see a painting by Graham Sutherland and a Russian submachine gun owned by a vicar.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael Aspel presents the antiques show from Sherborne in Dorset. Finds include an inflatable paper globe from 1830 and work by the illustrator of Winnie the Pooh.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: In the second visit to Sherborne School in Dorset, the experts find an original monk's bench, letters from Lewis Carroll, an 18th-century satinwood cabinet of great value, a cigarette case, and part of the airframe of the R100 airship.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: This episode of Antiques Roadshow comes from County Sutherland in the Scottish Highlands. Michael is making the journey by train because the venue, Dunrobin Castle, has its very own railway station.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael Aspel returns to Dunrobin in the Highlands for a look inside the Castle with Lars Tharp. There's a selection of unseen treasures from other Roadshows including fine jewelry, silver, and porcelain, and even a collection of Star Wars memorabilia.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: At Renishaw Hall in Derbyshire discoveries include a collection of swords, a homing pigeon clock, a patchwork quilt, and a valuable painting of a lion.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: At Renishaw Hall in Derbyshire, the finds include a portrait by Stanley Spencer and Sir Reresby Sitwell takes a look at what is purported to be Robin Hood's bow.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael Aspel presents in the gardens of Sudeley Castle, Gloucestershire, where the experts look over a fine regulator clock, a sapphire pendant, Winchcombe pottery, and a pouch traded with a dentist by Cligatac Indians in exchange for pulling teeth.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael Aspel and the experts travel to Lake Bala, in north Wales, where they see a pair of books inscribed to a local by Queen Victoria, an unusual collection of tie pins, and a portrait by Charles Spencelayh.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: In Trent, the team finds a jeweled elephant, a patch box in memory of Lord Nelson, an inlaid table from Goa, and a Victorian suit of armor for jousting. Best of all is a Crimea medal awarded to a man who took part in the Light Brigade's Charge.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: A Chinese vase brought to the Roadshow on a skateboard, an Italian dining chair, a French cabinet brought from the Caribbean on a banana boat, and a large Buddha clad in gold leaf - an international mix when the team visits Redruth in Cornwall.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Round-the-world yachtsman Sir Robin Knox-Johnson guides Michael Aspel around the National Maritime Museum in Falmouth, Cornwall, where finds include a Liberty belt buckle, a 16th-century drug jar, and an intriguing gramophone record.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: A set of musical drinking glasses, a pianist's finger stretcher, and Harry Lauder's piano give this edition a musical flavor. The team also finds rare local silver, a valuable doll, and a collection of drawings by Beatrix Potter worth a small fortune.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Atlanta
programme.desc: Valentina and Alicia zero in on Rocky; Rocky questions where Shannon's allegiances lie.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Atlanta
programme.desc: Valentina makes peace with Shanrock; Alicia's best friend visits.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Atlanta
programme.desc: Alicia and Valentina make amends; house gossip causes Nancy's temper to skyrocket.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Atlanta
programme.desc: After her blowout with Nancy, Rocky sets out to teach Alicia the true Bad Girl definition of jumping.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Atlanta
programme.desc: The girls head to Greece for the first annual Bad Girls Games; Alicia comes up with a plan to get revenge on Rocky.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Atlanta
programme.desc: Alicia takes care of some unfinished business resulting in a knock-down drag out brawl.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Atlanta
programme.desc: The girls square up one last time; Shannon comes out swinging.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Atlanta
programme.desc: Shannon takes a stand against the other girls; Nancy and Stephanie address their steamy affair.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Atlanta
programme.desc: The girls continue their reunion; Alicia is confronted about her shocking exit; a raging Nikki blows off steam by attacking an unexpected target.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Miami
programme.desc: Bad Girls Natalie and Camilla break down the cast and show fans just what it takes to land a coveted spot in the BGC house.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Miami
programme.desc: Country girl Tess wonders if she can take the heat; Sarah's abrasive nature immediately rubs her housemates the wrong way.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Miami
programme.desc: Sarah focuses her instigating energies into targeting the new girl; hot-tempered Gina is not the one to be messed with.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Miami
programme.desc: The house rallies against Sarah; Milyn's constant celebrity name-dropping rubs one of her housemates the wrong way.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Miami
programme.desc: The roommates try to push Sarah out of the house; boyfriend troubles affect Teresa.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Miami
programme.desc: Janelle gets on Shanae's bad side; Tiana's attempts to seduce Gina could permanently damage their friendship.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Miami
programme.desc: An explosive confrontation with Janelle sends an original Bad Girl home.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Miami
programme.desc: Andrea quickly offends the majority of the house by siding with outcast Janelle.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: After a fatal club shooting, Jon must work to rehabilitate the reputation of the Mystique Lounge in West Palm Beach, FL.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: In Bar Rescue first, Taffer must resurrect a closed neighborhood bar by reigniting the passion of the burnt-out firefighter who owns it.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon is brought in to save The Sandbar in Albuquerque, New Mexico, but before he can save the failing beach-themed bar, he has to figure out who the actual owner is first.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon must help the owner of The Kasbah in Aurora, CO, find a less rowdy clientele if he's going to save the once-thriving urban hot spot.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: TJ Quills has a troublesome reputation for serving minors, which can only be resolved if Jon is able to convince the owner to give up his frat boy ways.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon faces a real challenge with Cashmere Nightclub in North Carolina, where the wild manager thinks it's OK to sell cheap booze from pricey bottles.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon heads to Tampa, Florida to help save an owner who has suffered personal loss and health scares while trying to single-handedly keep his struggling bar afloat.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: After convincing his friends to invest their life savings, the rookie bar owner of Cirivello's has turned a community staple into a money pit and now faces a hostile takeover.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: An Irish bar owner's American dream threatens to go up in smoke when Jon discovers he's been withholding employees' paychecks to keep the business afloat.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: In Dunwoody, Georgia, Jon Taffer tries to help a former hospitality professional regain his passion for the industry and save his flailing bar.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: An explosive conflict breaks out among the owners of Dale 1891 when Jon discovers one of them has been siphoning off profits.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: An unappealing name is just the first of many problems plaguing Fatballs Sports Bar & Grill, where Jon must get a belligerent owner to accept responsibility.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon has to straighten out the abrasive owner of the St8 Pub, who has squandered a generous deal from the landlord and taken advantage of his mother financially.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon is brought in to help save a bar whose controversial lobster-tank claw-machine game drew protests from animal rights activists, which in turn drove away customers.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Craig, Mitch, and Garner go for a weekend hang-gliding trip, but Mitch has a serious accident, and ends up facing death before the fangs of a rattlesnake! Cort reacquaints himself with a woman who has a shocking secret.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: A massive earthquake destroys Baywatch headquarters and leaves Gina's life hanging in the balance. Meanwhile, Cort and Craig are trapped in the ocean. And Eddie is the only one left who can help a pregnant woman going into labor.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch rescues an underwater photographer that appears to have been attacked by a Sea Creature in an underwater cave, resulting in a media frenzy. Shauni rescues a young girl in the ocean then has to rescue her family from drowning.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: When a fishing trawler mysteriously sinks, the “Creature in the Bay” is thought responsible! Mitch, Devon and Captain Thorpe set out to prove there is more than meets the eye behind this Creature's mysterious attacks.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After Baywatch lifeguard Megan is attacked on the beach, she struggles to regain her confidence – unaware that her attacker, a fisherman, views her as the "One That Got Away." Meanwhile, Shauni suffers from lifeguard burnout.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After Mitch makes a heroic ocean rescue while working at her private beach party, a Hollywood producer offers Mitch the starring role in a movie. Meanwhile, Harvey and Shauni hold a wild bikini contest to raise money for an aquatic rescue group.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch receives an unexpected visit from his free-spirited brother, whose troubled son entices Hobie to surf the pylons of a treacherous condemned pier. Meanwhile, a local vendor nearly causes a riot when his bikinis disintegrate in the water.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After helping break up a gang fight on the beach, Eddie gets the idea of having some gang members join the lifeguard W.A.T.E.R. program designed to help troubled youths.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Baywatch lifeguards gain insight into the plight of the homeless when Hobie befriends a girl who's living on the streets. Eddie is attacked by a former mental patient known as “Hector the Collector.”

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Eddie goes on a blind date with Nicole, who turns out to be morbidly overweight, which leads to complications and an unlikely friendship. But Nicole's diet pills prove life-threatening. Meanwhile, Mitch’s life is comically disrupted by a stray dog.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Eddie is arrested for statutory rape after a teenage girl lies about seducing him in his tower. Meanwhile, Eric Turner, bitter about the paralyzing accident he suffered as a lifeguard, returns to Baywatch to reconcile his relationship with Megan.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Eddie is suspended from Baywatch over the statutory rape charge. He feels abandoned when no one believes his innocence pleas. Meanwhile, the reckless, paraplegic Turner, wanting to win Megan back, tries to impress her by hang-gliding off a cliff.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch falls for the beautiful woman he saved from drowning after she drove her car off a cliff, unaware that she's a cold-blooded murderer and con artist who was attempting to dispose of the murder victim of her latest scam when Mitch rescued her.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch and his ex-wife Gayle reconnect at their twenty-year high school reunion with unforeseen results. Eddie discovers an abandoned baby under his tower with a note imploring him to take care of it for 24 hours.

programme.title: Little Baby Bum en español
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum es un espectáculo divertido y educativo para niños que presenta canciones infantiles, clásicas y nuevas. Con sus amigos y familiares, Mía, de 6 años, experimenta el mundo que la rodea a través de canciones.

programme.desc: Little Baby Bum es un espectáculo divertido y educativo para niños que presenta canciones infantiles, clásicas y nuevas; amado por los bebés, y sus padres en todo el mundo.

programme.title: Bellator 237: Fedor vs Rampage
programme.desc: East meets West when Bellator MMA invades Tokyo with a stacked card that features MMA superstar Fedor Emelianenko and Rampage Jackson colliding in a long-awaited showdown. Also in action are Bellator stars Michael Chandler and Michael “MVP” Page.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to the Forum in LA. Darrion Caldwell takes on Adam Borics in the quarter-finals of the Featherweight World Grand Prix. In the main event, Julia Budd defends her Featherweight World Title against Cris Cyborg.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Known for their impressive fast finishes, 'Easy' Ed Ruth meets undefeated Yaroslav Amosov in anything but an easy fight as the two face off in the welterweight main event.

programme.title: Bellator 242: Bandejas vs Pettis
programme.desc: Bellator MMA is back from the Mohegan Sun Arena with a night of fast-paced action as Sergio Pettis battles Ricky Bandejas in a bantamweight title-elimination fight, while Jason Jackson clashes with dangerous veteran Jordan Mein at welterweight.

programme.title: Bellator 243: Chandler vs Henderson II
programme.desc: Former MMA World Champions Michael Chandler and Benson Henderson look to settle things once and for all after their first unforgettable battle ended in a razor-thin split decision in Chandler’s favor.

programme.title: Bellator 244: Bader vs Nemkov
programme.desc: It's a highly anticipated battle for light heavyweight supremacy as double-champ Ryan Bader puts his 205 lb. title on the line against Vadim Nemkov.

programme.title: Bellator 245: Machida vs Davis
programme.desc: A long-awaited rematch between two of the best light heavyweights in the world. Phil “Mr. Wonderful” Davis collides with Lyoto “The Dragon” Machida in battle.

programme.title: Bellator 246: Archuleta vs Mix
programme.desc: A bantamweight world title is on the line as hard-charging Juan “The Spaniard” Archuleta collides with undefeated submission machine Patchy “No Love” Mix.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: From the Mohegan Sun Arena, reigning Bellator Lightweight and Featherweight World Champion Patricio Pitbull defends his title against the relentless Emmanuel 'El Matador' Sanchez in a long awaited rematch.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Manipulative, violent, controlling, downright diabolical. These are words Anna-Laura uses to describe her mother-in-law, Janice. She says Janice is forcing her husband, Morga to choose between his mother and his wife. What can this family do to get along?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Mom Anita & daughter Alexa say an incident 3 years ago left the family shattered: an ex-husband, a loaded gun, a little boy caught between parents & now an ex-mother-in-law who says her son is blameless & is going to court for grandson visitation rights.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Bullies roam schools & playground--also work, social circles & under your own roof! Temica RoShawn, 26, admits to physically & verbally abusing overweight & people with disabilities. Comedian Kirk Fox goes undercover as a wheelchair user to test bias's.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In a gripping two-part series, Dr. Phil sits down with a family torn apart over accusations of the unthinkable. Melody says her 4-year-old granddaughter revealed that she was touched inappropriately by a man in a mask, and that the man was her daddy.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Bobby wants to peacefully co-parent with his ex-wife, Andrea, but says she's a liar, & a sex-addict who exposes their son, Kayden, 6, to her lifestyle. He says her bedroom a revolving door of men. Andrea says Bobby is obsessed with ruining her life.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: If you dread Valentine's Day and don't have a creative bone in your body, take heart, because Dr. Phil and Robin are here to help the romantically challenged!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Bleach, Keys, Bologna": all used as retaliation weapons. Dr. Phil, criminal atty Anthony Pope, & revenge expert Dr. Gina Barreca discuss--such as use of superglue on a man's private parts & also, Michael Brewer, 15, badly burned over a stolen bike. Pt.1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Heather's son, Brandon, 15, died of an accidental overdose at her home; authorities say the teen swallowed & snorted Heather's morphine pills while drinking vodka and beer. Acquitted of charges, Heather says her ex-husband Brian continues to blame her.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: The outrageous accusations & animosity continues between warring exes Libby & Brian. What happened that prompted Dr. Phil to consider asking Brian to leave and not return?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues his conversation with Kaye, Hear from Kathy's daughter who sides with Kaye. Plus, who is "Aaron?" Dr. Phil digs deep in search of answers -- tune in to see the results of the investigation! Is Kaye being scammed? Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil takes an intense look at the life of Star, a stay-at-home mom who fears that her dangerous habit may take a turn for the worse. Star's 11-year-old daughter, Autumn, sends Dr. Phil a poignant plea for help before tragedy strikes.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Fred & Cynthia say daughter, Crystal, is raising her young son in a death trap! No running water, leaky ceiling, exposed wires, smoking electrical sockets, mice & mold! They are ready for CPS. Crystal says her home is a visible form of how she feels.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Caylee Anthony's mom, Casey Anthony, has been named a person of interest in the case of the missing 3-year-old. Many fear the worst has happened. Dr. Phil examines the psychological aspects of the story that continues to grip America's imagination.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Jennifer claims her family has been the victim of hackers for 2 years. The problem is her husband, Billy, thinks she is the hacker! Things are so bad that Billy has asked for a divorce. Jennifer says she wants to clear her name & save her marriage! Pt.1

channel.display-name: Best of The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew is joined by rapper, actor, and entrepreneur Fat Joe at the news desk. Then, comedian Nick Kroll stops by to chat about his new stand-up comedy special, "Little Big Boy.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Bel-Air" star Jabari Banks is joining Drew to chat about his show. Drew and her co-pilot Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all-new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Culinary legend Ina Garten joins Drew at the news desk to break down the latest food headlines including desserts only invites and the gravestone recipe trend.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: All American" star Taye Diggs is joining Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk to hit the hottest headlines of the day! Jamila Norman is joining Drew and Taye and sharing tips on how to build your own herb garden.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Your Place or Mine" star Tig Notaro is telling Drew about working with Reese Witherspoon on their new film and the latest season of "The Morning Show.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew is joined by "Shotgun Wedding" star Josh Duhamel to chat about his new film. Inside Edition correspondent Lisa Guerrero is joining Drew and Ross Mathews to cover the headlines in a new Drew's News and dishes on her new memoir.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The hosts of "The Talk" Natalie Morales, Jerry O'Connell, Sheryl Underwood, Akbar Gbaja-Biamila and Amanda Kloots are joining Drew and taking on the final five to answer rapid fire questions about themselves!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Rob Riggle joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk to cover topics like the news of a potential "Dumb and Dumber 3" and the couple that opted for mashed potato powder instead of rice at their wedding.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up and covering headlines like the woman who tweeted the unusual snack her fellow plane passenger whipped out and the new device that allows lovers to kiss virtually.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Scream VI" stars Courteney Cox and Melissa Barrera are joining Drew in an all-new Drewber. Plus, "CBS Mornings" Tony Dokoupil joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross cover news about a senior dance troupe and a Jet-Puffed marshmallow pillow. Mark Anderson and Ryan Fey make skirt steak tacos. Damona Hoffman and Drew answer red flag questions.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Celebrity interior designer Mikel Welch joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk to tackle the latest design headlines including gnome mania, interior designers doubling as marriage counselors, the Biophilic design trend and more.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Cameron Diaz cook and chat about their culinary adventures. Andrea Lavinthal recreates Drew's past looks.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Kerry Washington stars in an all-new comedy show, 'UnPrisoned' by creator Tracy McMillan, and they're joining Drew to dish all about the new series.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News: Food News edition covering everything!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The Sex Lives of College Girls" stars Renne Rapp, Pauline Chalamet, Alyah Chanelle Scott and Amrit Kaur are dishing on all things season two of the hit show.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: David Duchovny talks about his career and upcoming rom-com with Drew. Kirby Howell-Baptiste joins Drew and Ross for Drew's News, discussing dating and British foods.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: CBS Mornings" co-host Gayle King is joining Drew and Ross Mathews to hit the headlines. Plus, its Drew' News: The Weekender Edition, a curated list of must-haves, must watches and more to do this weekend from Drew!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Fashion expert Zanna Roberts Rassi is sharing how to turn old clothes in your closet into cash. Celebrity hairstylist Chris Appleton is showing Drew a super simple updo with a secret weapon you probably already have in your closet.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew's chat with Michelle Obama continues and she's talking all about making friends in the White House and more.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all-new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The chef for the Academy Awards, Wolfgang Puck is telling Drew about the menu for this year and making one of his signature dishes served at the Oscars – the prime mini burger!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale needs investors for his real estate development project, so he enlists the Widow Fenwick

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts decide to get a taste of culture to fit in the high-class society of Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale's idea for Christmas presents are ones only fit for coastal California

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny tries to find the perfect man for Elly May.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny encounters a kangaroo, and thinks she's found a giant jackrabbit, but no one will believe her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: A father and daughter from back home come to Beverly Hills to meet Jed.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Lafe Crick comes back in another scheme to get rich off the Clampetts' wealth.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Elly May competes in a contest to determine "The Queen of Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Dr. Martin of the zoo keeps giving Ellie more critters than Granny can stand. While Jim Gardner (or Jim Garrrrr!) comes to sell "bug vittles" but ends up falling for Ellie.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed and Mr. Drysdale try matching Ellie with the bank's new CPA Fred Penrod (or Rod Fredpen) while Lafe continues to try to find where "Jed has his money buried".

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Lafe Crick tries some match making with his son Dub and Ellie. Jed has his reservations.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale tries to get the Clampetts interested in deep-sea fishing by sending them to Marineland. Thinking that it's a fishing hole, Granny wants to "catch the whale".

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: It's tonic time in Beverly Hills. Granny's made a batch of tonic and sends a sample to their new neighbor, the Countess Maria. She loves it and throws a party to celebrate.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale is having a ground-breaking ceremony for a new bank building and the Clampetts think they need to pitch in to help build it. Meanwhile, Mr. Drysdale's associates try to get stock market tips off of Jed.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts get a big food package from home and Mr. Drysdale's two associates, Mr. Lucus and Mr. Pendleton think that the crawdads have something to do with the development of military reconnaissance technology.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale has Jed buy a Beverly Hills dress store for an investment and the Clampetts show up to help "the poor widow and her starving girls".

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts try to turn their newly acquired Beverly Hills dress boutique, The House of Renee, into a country store, The House of Granny.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed sends Elly to the Beverly Hills dress boutique he used to own (now the House of Maurice) to learn how to be a lady, where Mrs. Drysdale mistakes her for royalty.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale wants Jed to incorporate for the tax advantages. So the Clampetts take over the top floor of the Commerce Bank and start doing what they can to stimulate the economy by getting more money into the hands of more people.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny's driving and Ellie's cooking makes a policeman and a cab driver think that the Clampett Mansion is a mental institution.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale gets Jed's old cabin from back home and sets it up in the Clampett's backyard to surprise Granny on her birthday. A coed with a sociology major thinks that they live there as the Drysdale's servants.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale hires a demolition man to remove the Clampett's cabin. Mr. Drysdale decides to occupy the cabin so it can't be removed. The Clampetts think a "homewrecker" is breaking up the Drysdale's marriage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro's running late for his graduation ceremony despite his new watch. Mrs. Potts of Jethro's school is afraid that his attendance will jeopardize her chances for a new endowment. Cousin Bessie saves the day.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale buys Mammoth Pictures, a movie studio. Jed, Granny, Elly and Jethro try to "help" the studio, which is losing money, by working at the studio.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale tells the Clampetts that he is building a city on the location where Jed's movie studio is located. The Clampetts mistake a western prop town for the city.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts decide to run the store on the empty studio Western set but can't understand why they don't have any customers.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S05E027) Steve and David organize a hip-hop night at the club to boost the sagging gate receipts. David asks Willie's nephew Juwan, a talented DJ, to join him onstage.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S05E028) Kelly becomes depressed after making the cover of Seventeen, as she fears that she will never regain her past looks.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S05E029) While under hyponsis, Dylan recalls a past life as a gunslinger in the Wild West.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S05E030) Dylan asks Kelly to join him on a trip around the world. Valerie sees the tickets in Kelly's room and tells Brandon.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S05E031) Jim and Cindy leave for Hong Kong. Kelly wants to continue her relationship with Brandon, but he cannot get over the rejected marriage proposal.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Kelly returns from a modeling stint in New York. Donna enjoys her summer with Ray, who has made an effort to make up for his past mistakes.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Donna, Kelly, Clare and Valerie try out for the Tournament of Roses Court. Brandon and Susan cover the Rose Court tryouts for the newspaper, and attend the party together. Toni surprises Dylan when they go motorcycle riding.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Valerie is haunted by nightmares about her father's suicide. David learns that his mother requires shock therapy to improve her chances of recovery. Toni throws a dinner party while her father is out of town.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Valerie gets herself invited on a road trip with Kelly, Donna and Clare. Steve convinces Brandon to let a director film a movie at the Walsh house. Marchette tells Toni that Dylan is using her.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Valerie accepts her marketing professor's invitation to a seminar. Bruno delivers a letter from Dylan to Toni. Steve and Clare quarrel after booking a motel room. Donna resists Ray's relentless attempts at a reconciliation.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: A fortune teller sets up shop at the Peach Pit for Halloween. In spite of her questionable credibility, her presence has an impact on many couples.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: Dylan asks Toni to marry him. An earthquake rocks the major Los Angeles area, spooking Colin. Donna sees her mother in a photograph of the 1969 Rose Court contestants, but Felice refuses to explain herself.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: The guys kidnap Dylan for his bachelor party. The girls throw a much wilder time for bride-to-be Toni.

programme.title: Big Brother

programme.title: Big Brother

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Who will conquer the wall and become the new Head of Household, and which houseguest will be targeted for eviction? Plus witness the war of words that blew the house apart before Izzys departure.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Who will win the Power of Veto, and will the plan to get Cameron on the block succeed?

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Will Cameron finally be evicted from the House? Who will follow? A terrifying Double Eviction kicks off Scary Week, a full week of gameplay and one night of fright. Plus, a scary ending that will send shivers down the spines of all who survive.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Jared and Cameron return from the grave as BB zombies, how will the house react to this spine-tingling twist? Plus witness all the crazy drama you didn't see during the death-defying double.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Which zombie will emerge from the Resurrection Rumble, with the power to put fate in his own hands? And who will have their game dead and buried for good?

programme.title: Big Brother

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Will Felicia or Mecole's soul be saved at the Veto Competition? And will Cameron's target change to a bombshell backdoor?

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Will Cory be back-doored? Or will Felicia stay in the line of fire? And who will be the final Houseguest evicted before Jury begins? Plus, a new Head of Household will be crowned.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: For weeks, the DJ has been laying low, but what happens when she's in charge? And which houseguests will she throw on the barbie at nominations?

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: With Ceaser and the bosses in Milwaukee for Ted's grand opening, the Brooklyn crew plays hooky with an unexpected guest. Ceaser deals with a crisis in Atlanta that has the whole crew scrambling while Rok and Krystal go MIA.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: As the artists keep the Atlanta shop running, Rok and Krystal's late arrival puts them in Ceaser's crosshairs. Tatti proposes a new role for her future at Black Ink, while Bae wonders how her friends will receive her new boyfriend.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: For one day only, all three cities- NY, Chicago, and Compton come together on one stage to compete for the title of Black Ink's Tattoo Titan.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: The crew celebrates 9 Mag's one-year shop anniversary & honors the memory of Ryan's late sister Nova. Phor expresses his feelings for Kat. Don & Charmaine take their relationship to the next level. A surprise visitor erupts real drama. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: Ryan is turning 29, so the crew plans a one of a kind surprise party. Don tries to make things right with his girlfriend Ashley, but when he is put on the spot about their future, things go from bad to worse. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: With his first solo music performance approaching, Phor decides to put it all on the line and pursue a relationship with Kat. After a harsh meeting with his lawyer, Van's future at 9 Mag is in jeopardy. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: After confronting Charmaine at Phor's concert and learning the truth about Charmaine and Don, Ashley makes a shocking decision about their relationship. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: After Ryan's meltdown, Kat and Van confront him about his erratic behavior. When the crew questions Kat's loyalty to the shop after she plans to attend a tattoo convention in New York without her 9Mag family, tensions escalate. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: The rest of the 9Mag crew heads to New York City to lend support to Kat and get in some partying while they're there. Ceaser and the NY crew throw a mixxxy party in their honor, but things get ugly when Charmaine taunts Don. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: What happens in New York, stays in New York...not! Upon their return from the Big Apple, Charmaine reveals a secret about her and Don's relationship. Phor receives some shocking news about his biological father. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: Ryan decides to throw a shop appreciation party in true Chicago summer fashion...on a yacht! While Kat takes some time away from the shop to think things through, the rest of the 9Mag crew lets loose. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: Shocking news at Van's final court appearance leaves him wondering if he should run. Kat's enjoying her time away from 9 Mag, but when the girls fail to pay her a visit, she questions their loyalty. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: With the death toll in Chicago at an all-time high, the 9Mag crew hosts an event to help victims of violent crimes. Meanwhile, in the Dominican Republic, Don tries to win Ashley back. Presented by VH1.

programme.desc: Nicole gets a part on the "Lester the Lizard and Crocodile Kids" show. When Mark complains about being assigned as the drivers' education teacher, PJ reassigns him to the home economics teacher position.

programme.title: Hangin' With Mr. Cooper: Free at Last
programme.desc: When Vanessa is not given the promotion she was promised, she takes Mark's advice to demand her rights and is promptly discharged from her job.

programme.title: Midday Rundown
programme.desc: CBS Sports HQ keeps you completely up to speed on all the top trending stories dominating the sports world.

programme.title: NBA Trade Deadline Coverage
programme.desc: CBS Sports HQ's NBA analysts break down all the wheeling and dealing surrounding the NBA Trade Deadline.

programme.title: Trending Now
programme.desc: CBS Sports HQ analysts break down the day's top stories and highlights.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Ni rendición, ni retirada
programme.desc: Después de que Reggie Wilson (Cyrus Farmer), un testigo en un caso anterior de Erin, le pide ayuda para desmantelar una operación de drogas en su edificio de apartamentos, ella se propone hacer que el edificio sea seguro para su familia.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Interferencia extranjera
programme.desc: Danny y Baez se unen con dos agentes rusos para buscar a un peligroso hombre ruso que ingresó a EE. UU. con una visa diplomática.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): La delgada línea azul
programme.desc: Cuando Danny intercepta un envío de varios millones de dólares que estaba destinado a un cártel de drogas en México, se convierte en un blanco cuando ellos regresan en busca de venganza.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo está detrás de un cirujano que hace amputaciones innecesarias.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo trata de encontrar una vínculo común entre cuatro hombres desaparecidos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo viaja a Miami para localizar a un delincuente que asesina a trabajadoras sexuales en un estilo similar a la matanza de animales.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo investiga los cadáveres quemados de varios indigentes cerca del muelle de Santa Mónica en California.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: París
programme.desc: Cuando la testigo estrella del gobierno en un caso de malversación es objetivo de un asesino, depende del equipo ayudarla a llegar a casa con vida.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Farsa
programme.desc: El equipo se encuentra en una carrera contrarreloj cuando un grupo terrorista amenaza con detonar una bomba radioactiva en la zona de Washington.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Navaja
programme.desc: Cuando un marine es encontrado muerto, Gibbs, Fornell y el equipo se dirigen a la carretera para detener una operación ilegal de camiones.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Día de las madres
programme.desc: Los secretos surgen cuando la ex suegra de Gibbs aparece como testigo en la investigación de un asesinato.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Poder absoluto
programme.desc: Danny y Báez investigan a un posible asesino en serie que le envía un mensaje escalofriante a Danny, y Erin juega con la idea de postularse para el puesto de juez.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): La historia perfecta
programme.desc: Cuando el reportero Lorenzo Colt (Zachary Booth) es atacado mientras llevaba equipo de la policía de Nueva York en un paseo junto con Jamie y Eddie, Frank pone a Danny y Baez a la caza del tirador que puede estar buscando a otros miembros de la fuerza.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El peor de los escenarios
programme.desc: Frank se pone en alerta máxima cuando una amenaza a la ciudad de Nueva York puede ser inminente luego de un ataque terrorista en el Medio Oriente.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Hundreds of eager hopefuls -- ranging from starry-eyed rookies to experienced NFL cheerleaders -- gather at AT&T Stadium for a shot at joining the world's most famous squad.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The 125 remaining hopefuls must nail a choreographed routine before advancing to the final rounds, and the DCC veterans reveal their plans for the future.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: A former Laker Girl who survived the Las Vegas shooting chases her dream, and the women work on their solo presentations and interviews as finals approach.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The returning veterans travel to the Bahamas to shoot the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders swimsuit calendar, and the rookies feel the pressure as training camp begins.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The first-year hopefuls get new looks on Rookie Makeover Day, DCC alumni give the candidates feedback, and Cowboys' Head Coach Jason Garrett stops by during a rehearsal.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Before Kelli and Judy make roster cuts, the rookies learn the famed kickline and jump splits, get fitted for the iconic uniform and face Jay Johnson's power squad training.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Emmy-winning choreographer Travis Wall tests the hopefuls' contemporary dance skills, Kelli and Judy make show group selections, and Melissa Rycroft teaches injury prevention.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: A veterinary technician chases her dream, Kelli has an uncomfortable conversation about an applicant's weight, and the women explore their new city.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Some candidates struggle to adapt to the larger stage when they finally hit the field to learn the DCC entrance, and Miranda is unnerved by criticism of her hair.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With so many strong candidates, Kelli realizes some of the cuts may not be dance-based, and media simulation day proves to be problematic for a few of the candidates.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: DCC hopefuls try on the iconic uniform for cameos, show off their hip-hop skills for celebrity choreographer Marty Kudelka and learn table manners in an etiquette class.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As the first football game approaches, Kelli and Judy watch tape on AT&T Stadium's famously large HD screens to see who is game day-ready -- and figure out the final cuts.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli and Judy make the emotional final cuts, dreams come true when the 2018 DCC squad is announced, and the women hit the field for their first game.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Daddy and Lil Bit deal with the aftermath of their secret, Lyle and Lauren kiss and make up, Tiffany doesn't think Lil Bit's story adds up, and Walt gets lucky.

programme.title: This Is Life with Lisa Ling

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man in a stolen vehicle sends officers on a high-speed chase, deputies confront a driver asleep at the wheel, and a trespassing call becomes a neighborhood-wide ordeal.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers engage in a foot pursuit after the passenger of a suspicious vehicle starts running. A man barricades himself in the house after stabbing his nephew. A teenager is caught ditching school to smoke marijuana.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies assist an injured woman who vows revenge on her male attackers. A woman tells deputies her husband beat her in front of their children. Officers protect an elderly woman from an abusive child.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A dangerous high-speed pursuit quickly comes to a head after the driver loses control. In Florida a man is pulled over in a stolen vehicle and asserts the car belongs to his parents. Arrests are made in a Florida prostitute sting.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer shows up as Coco the Clown in an undercover sting. The Vice unit conducts a reverse-prostitution sting designed to capture suspected “johns.”

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A runaway biker makes multiple clumsy attempts to slip away from deputies. A shady figure has a curious method of trying to get a drink of water. A young woman starts making unwise choices when her family leaves town.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A female victim tells the officers that two men kicked in her front door. Three suspects attempt to steal a bicycle in an alley. Following routine questioning of a petrified wife, officer arrests the husband for domestic abuse.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A patrolman pursues a scooter speeding through a neighborhood, officers try to subdue a raving man, and a woman has issues with her neighbor's dogs.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers investigate two vehicles involved in an accident. Officers respond to a call involving a man with a knife. Officers respond to a call involving a man with a gun at a nearby convenience store.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies chase a wanted man who makes a break for it, a man leads officers on a vehicle pursuit, and a routine traffic stop ends with an arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: There police arrest a bicycling drug dealer and his female client. Police respond to a call of an unhinged Rottweiler. Officers arrest an inebriated man after they spot him grabbing a female bystander.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver theorizes about America after fleeing a traffic stop, charges keep adding up for an unlicensed driver, and a woman stops at nothing to get to her trailer.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect in possession of a stolen truck leads everyone on a chase through some bumpy terrain. Gas station employees call police when they spot a couple asleep at the pump. A man familiar to deputies shows them he can change.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver pursued by police bails from her moving vehicle, a jaywalker decides to run from officers, and a patrol encounters a little boy who decided to run away from home.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man is arrested for stealing a large amount of copper wire from a business owner. A young man on a bicycle is charged with possession of drug paraphernalia and public intoxication. A man whose tags expired by a few years is pulled over.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers go undercover as dealers on a street corner for a drug-reversal sting operation. A man's property is destroyed by his girlfriend's ill-tempered father. An officer spots an intoxicated man assaulting a woman.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A cyclist sends officers on a frantic foot-chase through a neighborhood, and when searching a building, police find a woman hiding in a cupboard.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are assaulted by the brother of a suspect who is resisting arrest. A resident sprays water on his neighbor’s noisy dogs. Officers recover drugs and cash after pulling over a motorist.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies are concerned when a fleeing man leaves a trail of illicit items. A young woman unwisely decides to hang out with a man she nicknamed 'Sketchy.' Some well-placed security cameras help reunite a man with his stolen bike.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: La loca
programme.desc: Un joven psiquiatra se interesa en el caso de una paciente que cree vivir en el año 1936. Los parientes de ella quieren hacerla pasar por sana para poder cobrar una herencia, pero el médico lucha contra toda la familia para defender a 'La loca'.

programme.title: Juana Gallo
programme.desc: La verdadera historia de Angela Ramos una joven campesina que llegó a ser la cabeza de una guerrilla que lucho exitosa-mente contra las fuerzas federales del usurpador Victoriano Huerta. El pueblo la llamó por su fiereza “Juana Gallo”.

programme.title: El sordo (LAS)
programme.desc: Un escultor que fabrica imágenes de santos es golpeado por un matón y queda sordo. A causa de esto, se avergüenza y se va del pueblo.

programme.title: Música y Dinero
programme.desc: Cuando un grupo de empleados amenaza con hacer huelga, el jefe le pide a un amigo cantante que ha recibido una herencia que lo ayude con su problema.

programme.title: La gran evasión
programme.desc: Steve McQueen, James Garner y Richard Attenborough encabezan el elenco de una de las películas de aventuras con más ingenio y suspense. Un equipo de soldados Aliados organiza una fuga de un campo de prisioneros de guerra nazi de máxima seguridad.

programme.title: Moby Dick
programme.desc: Esta adaptación del clásico de Melville es insuperable en cuanto a entretenimiento, imaginación y aventura. Consumido por la rabia, el capitán Ahab (Gregory Peck) tiene un propósito en la vida: vengarse de la gran ballena blanca que lo desfiguró.

programme.title: Luna de porcelana
programme.desc: Un apasionado thriller de suspenso sobre un detective veterano en una pequeña ciudad de Florida, cuyo romance clandestino con una viuda joven y rica teje una telaraña de engaño, traición y asesinato.

programme.title: Find Me Guilty
programme.desc: Basada en la historia del gángster Jackie DiNorscio (Vin Diesel, 'Furious 7'), quien se representó a sí mismo en el juicio penal más largo de la historia de Estados Unidos. Con Peter Dinklage.

programme.title: Cielo azul
programme.desc: Jessica Lange hace una interpretación ganadora de un premio "Óscar" como la atractiva e inestable mujer de un científico nuclear (Tommy Lee Jones) que se enfrenta a difíciles decisiones morales a raíz de las pruebas atmosféricas que debe llevar a cabo.

programme.title: Amistad
programme.desc: “Amistad” es la historia de un motín en 1839 a bordo de un barco de esclavos que viaja a la costa noroeste de Estados Unidos. Gran parte de la historia tiene que ver con un drama judicial sobre el esclavo que lideró la rebelión.

programme.title: Rescate al amanecer
programme.desc: Durante la guerra de Vietnam, el piloto americano, Dieter Dengler (Christian Bale) es derribado y tomado prisionero por el Vietcong. Durante su cautiverio, le tocó vivir una de las experiencias más notables y horrorosas de toda la guerra.

programme.title: The Englishman Who Went Up A Hill But Came Down A Mountain (LAS)
programme.desc: Hugh Grant protagoniza un joven que ofende a todo un pueblo al decir que su montaña es una colina. Pronto se da cuenta de que los excéntricos lugareños, guiados por un ingenioso posadero (Colm Meaney) no se detendrán ante nada para defender su honor.

programme.title: The Curious Case Of Benjamin Button
programme.desc: Brad Pitt y Cate Blanchett protagonizan esta adaptación de la historia de F. Scott Fitzgerald acerca de un anciano que va rejuveneciendo y los problemas que surgen cuando se enamora de una mujer.

programme.title: A Month By The Lake
programme.desc: Una huésped encantadora en el resort cerca del lago Como tiene el ojo puesto en un simpático y adinerado soltero y hace todo los posible por capturar a su hombre adinerado.

programme.desc: Brad Pitt y Cate Blanchett protagonizan esta adaptación de la historia de F. Scott Fitzgerald acerca de un anciano que va rejuveneciendo y los problemas que surgen cuando se enamora de una mujer.

programme.desc: Una huésped encantadora en el resort cerca del lago Como tiene el ojo puesto en un simpático y adinerado soltero y hace todo los posible por capturar a su hombre adinerado.

programme.title: Narc: Calles peligrosas
programme.desc: Jason Patric es Nick Tellis, un oficial de narcóticos suspendido que debe investigar el asesinato de Michael Calvess, un policía novato que murió por circunstancias dudosas.

programme.title: Hostage
programme.desc: Un negociador de la policía fracasado que se convierte en un oficial de una pequeña ciudad debe salvar a una familia secuestrada, lo que lo conduce a una situación muy peligrosa.

programme.title: La suburban dorada
programme.desc: Un policía judicial es acusado de estar relacionado con el narcotráfico solo por ayudar a su primo. Las circunstancias lo convierten en un fugitivo de la ley y por recuperar a su hijo tiene que involucrase con el narcotráfico.

programme.title: Instinto predador
programme.desc: Un cazador (Nicolas Cage) debe luchar por su vida en un barco cuando sus mortíferos animales -entre ellos un raro jaguar blanco- son soltados por un peligroso criminal que quiere matar a todos a bordo.

programme.title: El Robo más Grande de la Historia
programme.desc: Basada en una historia real, Dwayne Johnson interpreta a un detective de la policía de Nueva York que intenta resolver el mayor robo de dinero de la historia de Estados Unidos.

programme.title: Terminator: El exterminador
programme.desc: En 2029, las super-computadoras dominan el planeta y buscan exterminar la raza humana. Para ello, mandan de regreso en el tiempo a un indestructible cyborg con la misión de matar a Sarah Connor, cuyo hijo se convertirá en la esperanza de la humanidad.

programme.title: Terminator 2: juicio final
programme.desc: La máquina no humana que domina la élite del futuro devastado por la guerra despacha un cíborg asesino al pasado para matar a un jovencito porque pronto será el líder de la resistencia en contra de la máquina.

programme.title: Ladrón que roba ladrón
programme.desc: A un par de ladrones profesionales se les complica su plan para robar a un millonario, después de que los mejores miembros de su equipo habitual, abandonan el plan. Los ladrones se verán forzados a contratar a novatos para completar el trabajo.

programme.title: Ladrones
programme.desc: Fernando Colunga y Eduardo Yáñez lideran las risas como los Robin Hoods modernos en esta tremendamente entretenida secuela del gran éxito "Ladrón que roba a ladrón".

programme.title: Piedras
programme.desc: La película narra la trayectoría paralela y conflictiva de cinco mujeres: Anita, Isabel, Adela, Leire, y Maricarmen. Ellas se esfuerzan para remover las piedras que insistentemente aparecen en su camino, o peor, que están en sus zapatos.

programme.title: El Norte
programme.desc: Celebremos el 35 aniversario de la nominada al Oscar "El norte" en una exquisita restauración de este clásico sobre inmigrantes guatemaltecos, que huyen de la violencia y buscan una vida mejor en Estados Unidos.

programme.title: Aquí entre nos
programme.desc: Cansado de que su esposa y sus tres hijas lo tomen por sentado, Rodolfo Guerra se despierta una mañana y decide no ir a trabajar. Luego empieza la locura.

programme.title: El ardor
programme.desc: Gael García Bernal protagoniza a un misterioso héroe que emerge de la selva argentina para rescatar a una joven (Alice Braga) y al rancho de su familia, de brutales usurpadores de tierra.

programme.title: Especies
programme.desc: Un experimento genético genera a una hermosa mujer mutante que amenaza a la raza humana.

programme.title: Especie mortal II
programme.desc: Un extraterrestre en forma de parásito se incuba en el cuerpo de un astronauta. Justin Lazard, Natasha Henstridge, Marg Helgenberger, Michael Madsen, Mykelti Williamson. Director: Peter Medak.

programme.title: Especies III
programme.desc: A medida que su especie se extingue por infecciones y enfermedades, una alienígena seductora inmunológicamente más fuerte se convierte en la única esperanza para que sigan viviendo.

programme.title: Encubrimiento
programme.desc: Una policía investiga el asesinato de un compañero y se enfrenta a un espíritu maligno que acosas a los policías de su unidad. Pronto descubre el siniestro secreto sobre el encubrimiento de un tiroteo en contra de un joven desarmado.

programme.title: La profecía: los olvidados
programme.desc: La saga épica de, La profecía, concluye con esta quinta y electrizante película. Cuando un antiguo libro de profecías predice la llegada del Anticristo, un grupo de ángeles caídos se dispone a cazarlo y capturarlo.

programme.title: Testigo
programme.desc: La viuda y madre de tres hijos, Annie Wilson, se gana la vida adivinando el futuro de los demás... a pesar de que el suyo se ha tornado más confuso de lo que ella misma puede ver.

programme.title: Hansel y Gretel: Cazadores de brujas
programme.desc: Prepárate para una versión retorcida del cuento clásico. Convertidos en profesionales, Hansel y Gretel se enfrentan al trauma de su cautiverio infantil, asesinando brujas a sueldo.

programme.title: El mundo según Wayne
programme.desc: Cuando un importante ejecutivo de televisión les ofrece a los locos y poco convencionales Wayne y Garth un jugoso contrato para que en su estación realicen su peculiar programa nocturno, ambos no pueden creer la suerte que tuvieron.

programme.title: El mundo según Wayne 2
programme.desc: Los dos roqueros favoritos de Aurora, Illinois están de vuelta en esta secuela de la comedia de El mundo de Wayne (1992).

programme.title: Un romántico funeral
programme.desc: Nada como la muerte para ponerle romance a la vida: La suerte de un desafortunado de 25 años cambia cuando es el portador del féretro de alguien que no conoce. David Schwimmer, Gwyneth Paltrow.

programme.title: Una noche sin luna
programme.desc: Durante la víspera del Año Nuevo, tres personajes solitarios viajan a una pequeña ciudad perdida en el campo uruguayo y, a través de sus caminos, tendrán la oportunidad de cambiar sus destinos.

programme.title: Enchufe sin visa
programme.desc: Una divertida comedia de seis latinos que viajan a Estados Unidos y pronto se verán inmersos en las situaciones más ridículas y vergonzosas. Desde un estudiante de intercambio, a una ingenua actriz, cada uno vivirá peripecias inesperadas.

programme.title: Último viaje a Las Vegas
programme.desc: Cuatro mejores amigos de toda la vida van a Las Vegas para dejar de portarse como adultos de su edad y revivir sus días de gloria. Al llegar, se dan cuenta de que las décadas transformaron Sin City y pusieron a prueba su amistad de manera impensada.

programme.title: ¿Solo amigos?
programme.desc: Harto de malas relaciones, Wallace (Daniel Radcliffe), que abandonó su carrera de medicina, decide poner su vida amorosa en pausa. Tras enamorarse de Chantry (Zoe Kazan), una animadora que vive con su novio Ben (Rafe Spall), el "amor" se complica.

programme.title: Un Ratoncito Duro De Cazar
programme.desc: Los dos hermanos sin suerte Lars y Ernie Smuntz no aprecian la vieja mansión en ruinas que heredaron, hasta que descubren que la propiedad vale millones.

programme.title: Dances With Wolves
programme.desc: After encountering and eventually being accepted by a Native American tribe, Dunbar's loyalties are put to the test when the army threatens his new home, forcing him to choose between white America or the natives he now calls his people.

programme.title: Hang 'Em High
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood stars in this brazen tale about a rampaging band of vigilantes who make two mistakes: they hang the wrong man and they don't finish the job. Inger Stevens, Pat Hingle, Bruce Dern & Dennis Hopper co-star in this action-packed western.

programme.title: Support Your Local Gunfighter

programme.title: Support Your Local Sheriff!

programme.title: Dances With Wolves
programme.desc: After encountering and eventually being accepted by a Native American tribe, Dunbar's loyalties are put to the test when the army threatens his new home, forcing him to choose between white America or the natives he now calls his people.

programme.title: The Missouri Breaks
programme.desc: Marlon Brando and Jack Nicholson ignite the screen in this rousing story of a wealthy Montana rancher who hires a professional killer to track down a gang of horse thieves.

programme.desc: Acclaimed director John Ford and screen legend John Wayne team up for what would be their final collaboration in this boisterous, rowdy South Seas escapade.

programme.title: South Pacific
programme.desc: On a South Pacific island during World War II, love blooms between a young nurse and a secretive Frenchman who's being courted for a dangerous military mission.

programme.title: West Side Story

programme.title: Donovan's Reef

programme.title: Green Acres

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: After a woman asks Archie to put out is cigar, Archie defends his smoking habit. Soon, the Bunker house is locked in a battle of wills after Mike vows he can go without food longer than Archie can abstain from smoking.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie and Edith are all excited and throw a mortgage burning party because they have finally payed off their mortgage. Meanwhile, Mike has completed his graduate classes and begins a fruitless seach for new lodgings.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: In celebration of its first 100 episodes, Henry Fonda hosts a retrospective of the previous episodes and explores the relationships and the characters that make up the Bunker household, via flashbacks.

programme.title: All in the Family

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude and Walter are having a sleepless night. The snowstorm which may ruin Walter's annual sale at the appliance store seems important until Maude admits her insomnia is due to her doctor's advice that she have a hysterectomy.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: With the weight of the women's lib movement resting squarely on her shoulders, Maude takes up her duties as manager over three men in a real estate office.

programme.title: Maude

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude is spending every spare minute with a handsome, best-selling author and Walter resents it. Walter thinks Barry Witherspoon is a pompous bore, regardless of his sexual preferences, but Maude defends him and accuses Walter of bigotry.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude and Walter are ecstatic. Walter's ex-wife, Marta, plans to remarry and the alimony monkey will be off his back. There's a flag on the play, however, when Maude meets Marta and learns the identity of the intended bridegroom.

programme.title: Maude

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: After an operation, Louie, the sharp-tongued dispatcher, panics when he has to keep a promise that he made to God during surgery to turn over a new leaf.

programme.title: Taxi

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: To understand each other better, Felix and Oscar reverse their roles -- Felix turning to a slob and Oscar becoming a fussbudget.

programme.desc: Kate Bradley is visited by an old schoolmate who's now a millionaire, but Uncle Joe has him pegged as a con artist.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction

programme.desc: Shady Rest would stand a better chance of being selected as the site of the big convention if Kate were around, but she's trapped in a cave-in.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob invites 44 fellow PTA members to his television show but forgets all about it until air time.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A policewoman's son holds up taxicabs for a hobby that eventually results in the murder of an undercover cop.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A psychiatrist with an interest in exploiting his patient's criminal past complicates a rape-murder investigation.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The Jurassic period saw the advent of the largest and strongest dinosaurs that ever roamed the Earth.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: A look at the world as it was 149 million years ago - in the late Jurassic Period. The old continents have broken up and much of the land is under water. Huge shallow seas have supported a revolution in marine life.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: With wings longer than those of a small plane, pterosaurs were the largest creatures ever known to have flown.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This programme looks at the Cretaceous period, 106 million years ago. Volcanic activity forces the continents apart, and dinosaurs diversify into a range of species to cope with environmental extremes.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: It is the late Cretaceous period and Tyrannosaurus rex is the top predator, but the Earth is poisoned by volcanic activity and a comet strikes.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the coelophysis and the diplodocus.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the opthalmosaurus and the ornithocheirus.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the leaellynasaura and the tyrannosaurus.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Special effects-filled documentary beginning 49 million years ago. The world is heavily forested and birds rule the planet, preying on small mammals. Whales have not yet evolved and their ancestors walk on the land.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: A pregnant basilosaurus, an 18-metre, carnivorous whale which lives in the Tethys Sea, is forced to kill the young of a smaller whale to ensure the survival of her unborn calf.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Going back 25 million years to the time of the indricothere, which was the largest mammal ever to live on dry land, being seven metres high and weighing 15 tons! The only threat to an adult would have been the hyaenadon which was the size of a rhino.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: The beginnings of mankind can be traced back 3.2 million years to Ethiopia and the advent of Australopithecus, a type of ape which, like humans, was bipedal. These early members of the human family faced many dangers, including the sabre-toothed cat.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Revealing the exotic, oversized creatures that inhabited South America one million years ago, such as the deadly smilodon, the largest of all sabre tooth cats.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Looking at the depths of the Ice Age, following a group of mammoths who have been forced to travel south with the advent of winter. On a dangerous journey across the Alps, many become trapped in bogs or fall victim to predators.

programme.title: 1-800-Missing

programme.desc: Forced outsider her comfort zone, Janelle struggles at her High Water audition; Tal confronts his bullies.

programme.title: Forensic Files
