programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Young Navajos in the Southwest were dying at an alarming rate. The tribe's medicine men provided investigators with a critical clue that would lead halfway around the world to a most unlikely killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A mother of two vanishes after a shopping trip. Her body is discovered a month later, and witnesses say they saw the victim being forced into a car by an unknown person.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1987, a human skull and some bones were discovered at a Boy Scout Camp near Farmington, Missouri. Facial reconstruction aids the investigators in this case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Investigators find a shoe print, several foreign hairs and unknown fingerprints at a murder scene. But they believe the most telling piece of evidence is the bite mark on the victim's chest.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A Modesto, California teenager goes missing. With no signs of struggle in her home, police suspect she has simply run away — until her naked, bruised body is discovered in a ditch 20 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An aspiring model turned up dead and the prime suspect was her boyfriend. When he was eventually cleared, investigators had to dig deeper to find the perpetrator. With the help of a forensic geologist, they identified the most unlikely suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An assistant manager of a Florida steakhouse is stabbed to death. It appears to be a robbery gone wrong, but a bloody fingerprint reveals that he knew his killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A surgeon is stabbed to death and the most likely suspect is seen in a restaurant at the time of the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1999, Patrick McRae was found dead in his Des Moines home and the crime scene was awash with blood. Analysis showed it had come from two people, one of whom was female.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1995, the founder of American Atheists disappeared with one of her sons, her granddaughter and $500,000 in gold coins. The police investigated several suspects, including David R. Waters, who worked for American Atheists.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2001, Ginger Hayes and her infant son were abducted during a carjacking. The crime had been reported by a witness within minutes of occurrence.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It was one of the most unusual cases in forensic history. Investigators had to find a way to solve a murder case using only a squashed tomato found at the crime scene and tiny, pinpoint reflections of light in a photograph.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is reported missing after a fight with her husband. Police suspect a man who reported a fire in his car. Two tiny drops of blood are found in the interior. Finally, a tiny clue inside the suspect's watchband helps solve the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a popular gym teacher is found dead of what appears to be an accidental gunshot wound, his family is suspicious. A tape recorded by the victim just before his death tells the true story of his strange marriage and his wife's insatiable greed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1995, when off-duty Maine State Trooper Vicky Gardner is attacked by Steven Fortin during a routine stop, it triggers a chain of events which jumpstart a stalled murder case in New Jersey.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the 1990s, the media dubbed Richard Rogers the "Last Call Killer" because he targeted men in gay bars who were obviously intoxicated.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman attends evening church services, then disappears. When her abandoned car is found, the tank is empty and a gas can she kept in her trunk for emergencies is missing.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A teenager went missing after an evening of horseback riding. Her body was found a month later, three miles from her home. But the killer unknowingly left trace evidence behind.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A Colorado hunter is the victim of a well-planned crime. Investigators suspect two weapons and two killers. But forensic evidence points them in a different direction — one much closer to home.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In little more than a month, two women who lived in the same apartment complex were brutally murdered. The similarities of the crime scenes led police to conclude they were dealing with a serial killer who harbored an intense hatred of women.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: For 15 months, a serial killer was strangling prostitutes in Florida, then taunting police by leaving the bodies in plain sight. The only clues were a tire impression and some threads.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman appears to have lost control of her SUV and plunged down an embankment into a shallow creek. But investigators suspect foul play when they find snowy footprints leading away from the crime scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: No one in a quiet residential community saw anything unusual the day one of their neighbors was brutally attacked and murdered. Fingerprints found at the crime scene and surveillance video helped investigators to apprehend the presumed killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Past Lives
programme.desc: The body of a wealthy American businessman was found in his rental car. Teeth and bone fragments were the only remains. When the victim's wife files an insurance claim for $7 million, investigators seek the help of a renowned forensic anthropologist.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2008, the body of Colorado real estate developer Alan Helmick was found by his wife, Miriam, who then became the prime suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On May 20, 2001, Carrie Nelson was beaten to death while working alone in a park office. The case went unsolved for six years. Finally, police found a match with DNA samples gathered from the crime scene.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Not feeling well, Lucy takes herself to the doctor and receives the happy news that she is pregnant. Ethel and Fred find out before Ricky and eagerly begin dreaming about being the lucky godparents. Getting the news to Ricky is not as easy.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: A doting husband and father-to-be, Ricky makes the mistake of giving more attention to the arriving baby than he does to his fickle wife. Ricky tries to please Lucy by making her waffles and he doubles his efforts by giving Lucy baby gifts.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky is holding auditions for a new revue he's putting on at the Tropicana. Ricky tells Fred and Ethel that they should audition, but a pregnant Lucy wants part of the spotlight as well. Ricky doesn't go for the idea, so Lucy sneaks into an audition.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Wanting to provide the best environment possible for her child, Lucy decides that she and Ricky should learn to speak proper English. Lucy makes a deal with a tutor who will teach English to the Ricardos.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: After members of her club throw her a baby shower, Lucy realizes that Ricky has become jealous of the attention she and the baby are receiving. She consults with a doctor when Ricky complains about nausea, dizziness, and stomach ache.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy decides that their unborn child should have artistic leanings, so she takes up sculpting. The fast-talking salesman in the art supply store she visits sells her an enormous amount of modeling clay, claiming she has talent.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: With her baby due any moment, Lucy finds it challenging trying to remain calm given Ricky's nervous behavior. When she asks the Mertzes to come over to offset Ricky, she winds up with three very anxious people.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy gets caught up in a tormenting cycle of buying a useless appliance from a fast-talking salesman, then trading it in for something more expensive when trying to return it.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Could it be? Is Lucy Ricardo not funny? When Lucy's jokes fail to crack a smile amongst her friends and husband, she begins to develop an inferiority complex. Her depression gets worse when she discovers she's no good at bridge.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ethel flashes back to the time when she and Lucy raced to win the presidency of their club, the Wednesday Afternoon Fine Arts League. When Ethel was nominated for the position, Lucy bribed another member to nominate her.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Fred and Ethel overhear a fight between Ricky and Lucy...or did they? It seems Lucy is reading a murder mystery out loud to the amusement of Ricky. But when Ricky playfully throws the book at Lucy, she ends up with a black eye.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes are out a restaurant and Lucy keeps changing her order and their seating. Ricky points out that she constantly changes her mind and never completes things.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos' infant is cranky and keeps his parents as well as their neighbors up at night. When a neighbor, Mrs. Trumbull points out that the lease forbids children and threatens to move out along with other tenants.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ricky are exhausted from walking the baby at night and hire a maid. Lucy prepares a list of dos and don'ts in order to set down the law for her new employee. However when Mrs. Porter arrives, she has her own list for her employer.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy wants to get into the act when Ricky is producing an Indian show at the Tropicana. Ricky instead hires the Mertzes to be part of the show, hoping Lucy will be cured of her show biz bug now that she is a mother.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky has planned a surprise party for Lucy's birthday and swears the Mertzes and all their friends to secrecy. Lucy, however, only knows that everyone has forgotten her birthday.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: An eligible bachelor is in town, and Lucy wants to set him up with a girlfriend of hers. The bachelor is a lingerie salesman by the name of Eddie Grant who is a friend of the Mertzes. Unfortunately, Lucy's attempts at matchmaking fail.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Without consulting Ricky, Lucy buys new living room furniture, using their old set as a down payment. Waiting for the right moment to tell Ricky the news, she hides the new furniture in the kitchen.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy feels that she and Ricky are growing apart because they don't share many of the same interests. To make up for this, Lucy decides to invite herself along to a camping trip that Ricky and Fred are going on.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Fujiko Mine is seen with the members of a failing circus troupe. A former member of the troupe, Tony Belacastro, known as the Magician, died ten years ago, but the secrets to his magic are written in his "Trick Recipes.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: The widow Elena is the only one who knows where her late husband hid his fortune. Zenigata shows up to protect her from Lupin's gang, who are out to steal it from her. Zenigata and Elena go to her mountain retreat to hide from Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Nyx, Agent MI6 of the British Secret Service, values his wife and daughters above all others, so he keeps his identity as MI6 a secret from them. However, one of his daughters is kidnapped by some mysterious men.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: An eerie old castle converted to a hotel, known as the "The Mansion of the Cursed Bride," where the ghost of a bride is said to appear. It's said that a priceless treasure rests in the hotel, so Lupin and the gang pay a visit.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Long ago a dictator was assassinated, and the assassins involved were later killed one by one. Goemon was one of those involved in the assassination. A former bodyguard of the assassinated dictator, the legendary sniper Zora, might be out for revenge...

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin is invited by both Fujiko and Rebecca to a couples-only wine auction party. Both women have their sights on the same thing: The Lovesick Pig, a legendary wine appearing in the auction.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Rebecca is kidnapped and Lupin must rescue her! Before she was kidnapped, Rebecca had been deciphering a book left behind by a genius scientist, and MI6 made the mysterious comment that it was the "Dream of Italy.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin finally deciphers the book left behind by the genius scientist Uraga, and then mysteriously falls asleep. He ends up in a world where it's impossible to tell whether what he sees is a dream or reality. Is this the "Dream of Italy"?!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin has been arrested and imprisoned. He's tried everything he could to escape, but Zenigata stops him every time. Zenigata then sends Lupin to an even higher-security prison, just to be on the safe side. Has the end of Lupin III has come at last?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin is so broke that he doesn't know what he'll eat tomorrow, so he concocts a plan to steal the Mona Lisa. But the Mona Lisa won't be easy to steal. He does his best to weave through the security net Zenigata has set.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Like a she-devil, the diamond "Cleopatra's Soul" is constantly changing owners. In search of the diamond, Lupin arrives at what appears to be an ordinary school...

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin, Jigen, and Goemon decide to go eat some tasty sushi, but when they hop in the car to leave, they find a dog inside. Lupin promises to drop the dog off with Fujiko while they're out getting sushi.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Greco is a man revered as a savior for defeating evildoers one after another. Everyone Greco targets die within 24 hours, killing and being killed by their own comrades. When provoked by Greco, Lupin and the gang head to Greco's church.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: A mysterious portrait of Lupin appears at a major fashion show in Milan. When it's determined that the portraits have been painted by Leonardo Da Vinci, Lupin realizes something and rushes to the church where "The Last Supper" is displayed.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: While shopping with his family, Nyx is shot by someone and loses consciousness. He wakes up bound, and before he is Percival, his boss from his days as MI6.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin has stolen the car that the famous singer Nora Anita loved and drove for nearly half a century. Zenigata and the police are after him, but they won't make a move for fear of damaging the priceless car. Where is Lupin headed in the treasured car?!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: While in Italy, Lupin gets a call from someone claiming to have kidnapped Fujiko. The kidnapper blackmails Lupin into stealing a marionette once owned by Gennai Hiraga and now being kept in a mansion in Tokyo.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Declarations of theft show up throughout the city, and they all bear the message "Tonight I'm going to get you, Lupin III," with a lipstick mark underneath. The one who's been distributing the notes is Rebecca.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Da Vinci announces that he is going to unveil his latest work in San Marino. Its title is "World Harmony." After the announcement, for some reason, people all around the Italian Peninsula fall unconscious... and Lupin and the gang are no exception.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Rebecca's personality is under Da Vinci's control. In an effort to save her, Lupin delves into her mind, where he struggles with all kinds of traps set by Da Vinci. He manages to find Rebecca's memories, but Da Vinci has overwritten all her memories.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin meets Rebecca to sign divorce papers, before they could finish they are attacked by zombies.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Rebecca remembers the first time she meets Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd TVSP #13: Alcatraz Connection
programme.desc: Master thief Lupin III, gunslinger Jigen and swordmaster Goemon are back for a new caper, this time aboard the casino-ship Machine Gun Kelly. Between the mafia, interpol, and a secret organization based under Alcatraz!

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #14 Episode 0: The First Contact
programme.desc: The stickup that started it all! Lupin and Fujiko are both after an ancient artifact Jigen is supposed to protect, while Goemon happens to be searching for his clan's lost treasure nearby. Of course, Inspector Zenigata isn't far behind.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 9/25/14: All eyes are on Derek Jeter as he plays in his final home game of his 20-year career. Yankee Stadium erupts when "The Captain" knocks a walk-off RBI single against the O's in an emotional win for the Yankees.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 9/30/14: The Royals rallied back three different times, and Salvador Pérez laced a clutch walk-off RBI single to defeat the Athletics in the 2014 A.L. Wild Card Game, 9-8.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 6/20/15: Max Scherzer carried a perfect game into the 9th inning against the Pirates, but a hit-by-pitch cost him the chance at perfection. However, the Nationals ace just needed to get through one more batter to finish off his first career no-hitter.

programme.title: This Week in Baseball

programme.title: This Week in Baseball
programme.desc: On this edition of This Week in Baseball, check out some Greg Maddux highlights along with other Braves players' stories from the 1990s, analyze Tim Wakefield's knuckleball, and take a look at Dave Stewart's career and journey to the A's.

programme.title: This Week in Baseball
programme.desc: 9/26/96: On this edition of This Week in Baseball, former Major Leaguer Pete LaCock participates in the Iron Man challenge, Mo Vaughn slugs three home runs in one game, and much more!

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: David Ortiz made baseball history when he went yard twice against Matt Moore and the Rays to reach the 500-homer club. Big Papi became just the second player to hit his 499th and 500th home run in the same game.

programme.title: Great Games

programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a children's plastic potty, takes it to his bathroom and compares it to the adult-sized toilet. Prince Tuesday comes up with a game using a bucket but has had his feelings hurt when his father was not impressed.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: King Friday denounces the magic finder balloon. Neighbors Aber and Robert Troll are looking for Lady Elaine. They find her locked in a room of the Museum-Go-Round. At Mister Rogers' house, Levar Burton reads “The Daddy Book.”

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers explains how a wheelchair lift works, and then shows one in action. He shows some of his puppets. Mayor Maggie and Neighbor Aber ride in a wheelchair until they have their checkups from Dr. Bill.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits with Koko the gorilla, who has learned how to communicate in sign language. In Make-Believe, there's a gorilla, too, who seems scary until the neighbors get to know him. And there's a video of how people make play balls.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: At the eye doctor's office, Mister Rogers takes part in a general eye examination. The gorilla catches Lady Aberlin as she stumbles, which alarms Lady Elaine Fairchild. Lady Elaine is determined to catch the gorilla.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mr. McFeely stops by with a film about a service dog aiding a handicapped child. Mister Rogers visits with the boy from the video and his dog. Lady Elaine Fairchile continues her efforts to catch the gorilla. Neighbor Aber is missing.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers reads a book about a dog named Zak. There's also a video visit to the Center for Creative Play, a place where children of all abilities can play.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Marilyn Barnett brings someone who has great talent with yo-yos. Mister Rogers shows a film of how people make wooden yo-yos. Prince Tuesday plays well with the yo-yo, but King Friday does not. Therefore, the king outlaws yo-yos.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers and Mr. McFeely ride with Maria Mancano on a helicopter. Miss Paulificate and Lady Aberlin have been assigned the duty of “yo-yo guard,” responsible for upholding the King's ban on yo-yos.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mr. McFeely shows a photo album with pictures of Neighbors wearing different hats. Lady Aberlin informs King Friday that Lady Elaine's helicopter, Yo-Yo, is stuck in the air. King Friday commands that all references to yo-yos be removed.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits Maya Lin at her studio to see how she first makes small models of big things she is working on. They go to Penn Station to see what she created there. In Make-Believe, there's a video visit with cellist Yo-Yo Ma.

programme.desc: Visiting a nearby dance studio, Mister Rogers watches a class of young students learning to use ribbons as part of their dance routine. Henrietta is still ringing her new bell and X the Owl is growing quite frustrated.

programme.desc: Anthony Bourdain shows that there's more to Philly than just cheesesteaks.

programme.title: The Layover with Anthony Bourdain
programme.desc: In Taipei, Anthony Bourdain finds the pork and dumplings of his dreams.

programme.title: The Layover with Anthony Bourdain
programme.desc: From Koreatown to the Chateau Marmont, Anthony professes his love for LA.

programme.title: The Layover with Anthony Bourdain
programme.desc: Tony cruises around in the baddest car he can find to take on Chicago.

programme.title: The Layover with Anthony Bourdain
programme.desc: Tony takes on his hometown of New York City.

programme.title: The Layover with Anthony Bourdain
programme.desc: In New Orleans, Tony indulges in fresh crab and shrimp and drinks Sazerac.

programme.title: The Layover with Anthony Bourdain
programme.desc: Local friends expose Tony to the wild, exciting, proud culture of Montreal.

programme.title: The Layover with Anthony Bourdain
programme.desc: Anthony Bourdain does as the French do and indulges in a duck press.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony heads back to his beloved Salvador in northeastern Brazil.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: He Said Give Your Baby Away and You Did
programme.desc: Shannan claims Tim fathered her child. He doesn't buy it because he doesn't recall having sex with her! Later, Ayana is furious that her boyfriend Patrick denies their son!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Sherronda and Derrick are back! He's accusing her of cheating with his best friend of 40 years, Leslie! Next, Amanda admitted to cheating on Eli a few months ago, but now suspects Eli of doing the same to even the score!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Da'Shan is here with his new girl Tyrekia to prove that he's not the father of Ashley's baby! Ashley is 1000% positive that Da'Shan is the father and is here to prove it once and for all. But what will the DNA results reveal?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Jahaza believes that her fiancé Rafiq is cheating on her with the babysitter! Nikema is married to a motivational speaker named Drew. Is he motivating other women into his bed? Plus, Kim and Aaron are back…but this time she's got a secret to reveal!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Nick denies Chantelle's baby, but she wants to prove he's the father and make him pay up. Mario's mother Evette says she went "undercover" to prove that Sierra cheated on her son and that he is not her baby's father! What will the DNA results reveal?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Trey thinks Queshia slept with his father Nate and Nate could be the father of their baby. Then, Eric began hearing rumors that his girlfriend Blue was having sex for money while he was taking care of their children. Is Trey right or paranoid?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Pam suffered two miscarriages from the stress of her boyfriend Miguel's cheating accusations. Felisha confessed to cheating on her boyfriend Natron, but Natron denies fathering her two kids. The truth shall set some of these guests free!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Lianna and Devone have been married for a year, but she suspects Devone of being unfaithful because he stays out all night and is rarely home. Then, Kya is out on a $50,000 bond for allegedly abusing her newborn son, but did she do it?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Teneal and Richard are telling different tales, each alleging the other is unfit to parent! The truth will come down to a lie detector test, and the results will be shocking!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Jessyca thinks that Shon and Mellisa may be having a secret relationship. Christine is here to tell her friend Chelsie that Carl isn't the faithful boyfriend she thinks he is. Plus, Char's man, June, gets revenge by having sex with Erin.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Jake slept with his brother Joe’s fiancé. Then, Danny claims he’s leaving his fiancé Heather for a professional escort named Chelsi. Plus more stories of wild nuptials.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Hope is here to confront her best friend, Laura, for stealing her boyfriend, Joey, and then becoming engaged to him. Next, John will claim he's not to be blamed for sleeping with his girlfriend's best friend!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: In this special episode, a group of select viewers will duke it out with some of Jerry’s outrageously memorable guests!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Sherry is furious with her ex-best friend Kim who seduced her son Nick. Then, Angie confronts her husband Dale's lover Bobbie who tries to come between them!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Carlton is here to reveal to his girlfriend that he’s leading a gay double life. Plus Tom Bergeron from TV’s ‘Dancing with The Stars’ will play celebrity judge in a dance-off. Then, Crystal reveals her infidelity to her husband Bobby.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Steaming mom Mary confronts her daughter Tina for stealing her man and Chrissy confronts Robert’s other woman, Anna! Rere confronts Arthur’s other woman…who is actually a man!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Today, Vicki will face her husband Jason and his lover with an ultimatum and Anna admits she’s trying to steal Misty’s husband – again!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Our guests say they're ready to come clean. Yolando regrets sleeping with her best friend’s boyfriend and Cameron has been hiding a secret from his roommates.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Aeshia ha venido a demostrar a Terrence y a su esposa Lashondra que Terrence es el padre de su hijo, pero Lashondra sabe que se equivoca. Tanto Shaunah como Chris se han convencido de que les son infieles. ¿Quién es el padre?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: La relación de dos años de Anastasia y Robert terminó cuando él escuchó rumores de que ella le era infiel. Ella dice que siempre le ha sido fiel, pero Robert no le cree y ahora duda que sea el padre de su bebé recién nacido.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Stephanie dice que desde que llegó a casa del trabajo y encontró a su hijo de un año con un ojo morado, ha temido que la niñera de sus hijos los lastime. La niñera Cheryl niega las graves acusaciones acerca del niño.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Thornton dice que no puede confiar en su novia infiel Crystal y quiere que se someta al detector de mentiras. Además, Stephanie quiere demostrarle a su marido, Mathew, que no está teniendo sexo con un miembro de su familia.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Deshawn afirma que su ex Lynette abandonó a su hijo de 5 años. Pero ella afirma que él la está alejando de su hijo. Sin embargo, Deshawn se enteró recientemente de que no está en el certificado de nacimiento de su hijo, ¡así que quiere una prueba de ADN!

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Stephanie dio a luz a un niño y cree que Brandon es el padre. Pero Brandon afirma que no supo del niño hasta tres años después y niega ser el padre. Stephanie y su mamá quieren que Brandon se haga cargo.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Megan quería saber si su novio Devin era infiel. ¡Pero salieron a la luz secretos de relaciones aún peores! Además, te sorprenderá saber por qué Laura y Steven necesitan que Steve los ayude otra vez.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Desmond cree que su ex, Cassandra, está inventando todo un cuento de que él ha tocado a su hijo porque está celosa de su nueva prometida. Después, Tammy ha sido investigada por abuso infantil e incluso acusada de encerrar a sus hijos en un armario.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Russell quiere volver a reunir a su familia luego de que sus 3 hijos murieron en un incendio. Después, Tatiana cree que su sobrino de 2 años sufrió abusos. Además, acusa al ex-prometido de su hermana, Chris. Chris dice que no es un abusador.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Curtis se sentó con su madre Telisha, y le dijo que está tratando de tener un bebé, pero Telisha se horrorizó y se preocupó porque Curtis apenas tiene 13 años. Curtis asegura que está listo para ser padre.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Kelsey dice que su marido la maltrata. Malcolm cree que Kelsey le ha sido infiel desde el principio y que sus dos hijos pueden ser de otro hombre. Además, el novio de Carrie, Chris, cree que su hijo es de su ex.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Monique quiere probar que Chris la atacó cuando la llevó a casa después de una fiesta. Chris niega haber hecho algo malo y dice que Monique estaba demasiado borracha como para ser consciente de lo que pasó.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Devon entró en coma y está conectado a un sistema de soporte vital. Antes de caer en coma, le dijo a su madre que su ex, Alisha, le dijo que no era el padre de su hijo. Alisha niega haber dicho esto y siente que toda su familia le ha dado la espalda.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Bambi nos da una rara y honesta perspectiva de su ultra exclusivo estilo de vida en Los Ángeles. Tiffany se enfrenta a C.T. por un feo negocio.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Fedora le reclama a Paco el haberse casado con Octavia y el hecho de querer ocultárselo.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Octavia va a la casa donde vive Paola y se encuentra con la sorpresa de que la otra esposa de Pancholón es nada más y nada menos que Caramelo.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Silvia planea que cuando se confirme la desaparición definitiva de Diana, ella le confesará a Maximiliano la verdad que el hijo de Diana es de él.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Margot y Willy tienen otra de su discusiones, pues ella insiste en que cobre su herencia. Panchita y Santiago oyen la discusión con preocupación.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Mariana llora al acordarse de Willy. Juliana y Ricky van con Hilario a ver al doctor de Luciano y lo engañan para sacarle la verdad sobre su salud. Natalia y Rosa se divierten bailando.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Hilario y Mariana intentan que Ricky no se dé cuenta de que su mamá y su abuela están borrachas, pero no lo logran. Mariana libera a Hilario y Ricky de toda culpa.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Para disgusto de Margot, Willy invita a Mariana y Martin a una cena para celebrar el cobro de la herencia y molestar a Gertrudis. Morgana inventa un encuentro con una amiga y Luciano le entrega las llaves de la caja fuerte.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: En el hospital, tras enterarse de la noticia del accidente que sufrió Iván, Rosaura se muestra interesada en saber el diagnóstico de su hermano.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: En el hospital, Rosaura se encuentra con Luis Mario y le hace una propuesta, que se aparte de Eva y ella también se alejara de Rafael.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: A su llegada al hospital, Karina es testigo de la nueva crisis nerviosa de su hermano Iván, quien les suplica a todos decirle la verdad sobre su estado.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario se presenta en la oficina de Rosaura, con la intención de pedirle un préstamo para salvar su hacienda. Rosaura, sorprendida, le dice que no entiende porque tiene que buscar a ella.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Silvia planea que cuando se confirme la desaparición definitiva de Diana, ella le confesará a Maximiliano la verdad que el hijo de Diana es de él.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Las monjas esperan a que Diana se recupere, pero cuando despierta se encuentra demasiado débil.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Larry visita a Gaby y ella le pide que se vaya. Miguelina los aconseja para tratar de cambiar su forma de pensar en momentos difíciles.

programme.desc: With Doflamingo thoroughly quashed and the Birdcage collapsing, the people of Dressrosa shed tears of joy remembering the hardships they've endured, and the actions taken by Luffy and the others to free them.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Jesus Burgess of the Blackbeard Pirates tries to agitate Sabo, mocking Ace's final words in order to unsettle him enough that he can try to steal the Flare-Flare Fruit! Meanwhile, people of Dressrosa beg King Riku to resume the crown.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Repercussions of Doflamingo's defeat reverberate around the world! Fujitora's actions put the Navy in a tight spot, and the "Worst Generation" beings to stir into action!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The combatants in the battle for Dressrosa can finally begin to recoup, but those who stay awake are treated to the story of how Sabo joined the Revolutionary Army!

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As Sabo departs, our attention shifts to the other Straw Hats waging a fierce battle on a mysterious island. And a new drama is set into motion as ill portents fall from the sky!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As Luffy and the others begin to come to their senses, major players in the Navy arrive to search Dressrosa for the Straw Hats! Also, Rebecca's history is whitewashed with a fake cover story - but why?

programme.title: One Piece

programme.desc: The remaining girls freak when Grammy Award-winning recording artist Ciara shows up at their apartment to offer some words of advice.

programme.desc: For the final challenge, RuPaul sends her All Stars on a junket that culminates with a stand-up routine at L.A.'s Comedy Store. Cheri Oteri is their comedy coach and is joined on the judge's panel by The Gossip's Beth Ditto.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race All Stars
programme.desc: The queens are challenged to perform in a lip-syncing dance number inspired by the legendary historical women. Fashion designer Jeremy Scott guest judges.

programme.desc: Somali Pirates, modern-day, RPG-blasting hijackers of the high seas battle the Medellin Cartel, Colombia's most notorious drug lords. These two brutal crime gangs will face off with machine guns, machetes, and explosive car bombs.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: The remaining participants, short on food, risk death in their attempt to triumph. Only one survivalist will be able to endure the wilds of Patagonia and take home the $500,000 prize.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: After one of the longest tests of endurance in series history, the participants of Alone's third season reunite to discuss their experiences, genius creations, and reveal never before seen footage.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths are tasked with forging a signature blade from a bicycle. The two smiths that advance to the final round must recreate an ancient, mysterious weapon called Wind and Fire Wheels.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths are tasked with forging friction folders from a steel coil. In the final round, the two remaining smiths must create a blade that requires precision and detail: the French Smallsword.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When a UFO is spotted dangerously close to Los Angeles, Don recruits Charlie to help locate the mysterious aircraft's point of origin and is surprised when it turns into a murder investigation.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don must find two violent felons who escape after their prison bus is in a car accident, on the first season finale.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and his team find a suspicious code during a raid which Charlie determines is part of a secret plan to assassinate a Colombian exile living in Los Angeles

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don uses Charlie and Megan's expertise when the FBI is called to the scene of a federal judge's wife's murder.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team investigates the disappearance of a local television weatherman who goes missing after he shows up to work bleeding from his side.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team searches for a missing teen who disappears after her mother picks her up from school. Jack and Samantha's relationship hits a speed bump. ADAM KAUFMAN guest stars.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team searches for a missing bar owner who possesses a religious statue which is believed to create miracles. THOMAS CALABRO ("Melrose Place") guest stars as Eddie Gilroy.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team searches for Elena's former partner who disappears after an undercover sting operation.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team searches for two women, neighbors, who were abducted in broad daylight. The case takes a surprising turn when the agents discover the identity of the abductor.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team searches for a man who is abducted while posing as a college student and discovers he has been faking his identity for years.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team searches for a mother and her infant son who disappear after attending a self-defense class.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team searches for a missing trial consultant. Recurring guest star VANESSA MARCIL ("Las Vegas") appears as Kim Marcus, a juror whom the victim recently consulted.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team searches for a missing psychologist whose brother has a criminal past. Plus, Martin's relationship with Kim (recurring guest star VANESSA MARCIL) heats up.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: As the team searches for a missing high-end Russian matchmaker, the agents find they have no shortage of suspects.

programme.title: Showdown at the Grand
programme.desc: A proud movie theater owner must defend his family business from corporate developers alongside a legendary action star as art imitates life in a showdown for the ages.

programme.desc: When Bradley (Vince Vaughn) is sent to prison, he is forced to commit acts of violence that turn the place into a savage battleground.

programme.title: The Getaway
programme.desc: An ex-con and his devoted wife must flee from danger when a heist doesn't go as planned.

programme.title: Showdown at the Grand
programme.desc: A proud movie theater owner must defend his family business from corporate developers alongside a legendary action star as art imitates life in a showdown for the ages.

programme.title: Bandits
programme.desc: The suave Joe and his hypochondriac partner Terry have escaped from prison. Cutting a swath from Oregon through California, these fugitives rob banks in order to finance their scheme for a new life south of the Border.

programme.title: 3000 Miles to Graceland
programme.desc: Posing as Elvis impersonators, ex-convicts rob a Las Vegas casino during an Elvis Presley fan convention, but greed and dissention among them ultimately lead to betrayal and chaos.

programme.title: The Belko Experiment
programme.desc: Welcome to Belko Industries, a normally calm workplace that's about to devolve into a blood-soaked battle royale of bone-crunching horror when 80 employees are locked in their office building and forced to play a ruthless game of kill or be killed!

programme.title: Child's Play (2019)
programme.desc: In this shocking re-imagining of the horror classic, single mother Karen (Aubrey Plaza) buys her son Andy (Gabriel Bateman) a seemingly innocent, AI-enhanced Buddi doll, unaware of its more sinister nature…and its true name…Chucky!

programme.title: The Little Hours
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, a young servant fleeing from his master takes refuge at a convent full of emotionally unstable nuns. Introduced as a deaf mute man, he must fight to hold his cover as the nuns try to resist temptation.

programme.title: Crystal Fairy
programme.desc: Michael Cera stars in a hilarious comedy about an obnoxious American and a girl named Crystal Fairy (Gaby Hoffman) who take a hallucinogen on a trip through Chile.

programme.title: Donnie Darko (Theatrical Cut)
programme.desc: After narrowly escaping a bizarre accident, a troubled teenager is plagued by visions of a man in a large rabbit suit who manipulates him to commit a series of crimes.

programme.title: Ghost World
programme.desc: The story of neo-cool Enid and Rebecca who, faced with graduation from high school take a hard look at the world they wryly observe. When Rebecca focuses her attention on mutual romantic fixation Josh, the girls friendship is forever changed.

programme.title: Heathers
programme.desc: Winona Ryder, Christian Slater, and Shannen Doherty star in this cruelly hilarious dark comedy, which became one of the biggest cult classics of the `80s.

programme.title: The Legend of Bagger Vance
programme.desc: A disillusioned war veteran, Rannulph Junah, agrees to play a game of golf. He finds the game futile until his caddy, Bagger Vance, teaches him the secret of the authentic golf stroke.

programme.title: House of Gucci
programme.desc: Inspired by the true story of the family behind the Italian fashion empire. When Patrizia Reggiani marries into the Gucci family, her unbridled ambition begins to unravel the family legacy and triggers a spiral of betrayal, decadence, and murder.

programme.title: Across The Universe
programme.desc: A love story about a British boy and an American girl set against the backdrop of the social upheaval of the 1960s.

programme.title: Jobs
programme.desc: College drop-out Steve Jobs teams with childhood friend Steve ìWozî Wozniak to assemble the first Apple Computer in his parentsí garage. Driven by a relentless pursuit of excellence, Jobs transforms the world of computing at the cost of his personal life.

programme.title: Mr. Holmes
programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes has one last case to solve that has haunted him for fifty years. Now he must quietly slip out of retirement and pay a secret visit to his past in order to determine the future, in this intriguing and thoughtful suspense-thriller.

programme.title: This Beautiful Fantastic
programme.desc: Set against the backdrop of a beautiful London garden, this contemporary fairy tale centers on the unlikely friendship between a reclusive young woman who dreams of writing children’s books and a cranky widower.

programme.title: Cloverfield
programme.desc: Five young New Yorkers face a life or death struggle in order to escape from the city when a monster the size of a skyscraper suddenly appears.

programme.title: Labyrinth
programme.desc: Sixteen-year-old Sarah must solve a labyrinth to rescue her baby brother when he is taken by the Goblin King.

programme.title: Evolution
programme.desc: A firefighting cadet, two college professors, and a geeky-but-sexy government scientist work against an alien organism that has been rapidly evolving ever since its arrival on Earth inside a meteor.

programme.title: Galaxy Quest
programme.desc: Nearly twenty years after the cult TV show Galaxy Quest was cancelled, the alumni cast is asked for help by an alien species in order to save the universe.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati makes three classic Sonoran recipes, each one a meal in itself: a fish special called pescado zarandeado, a rich stew called gallina pinta, and a tasty dirty rice with clams. In Sonora, she visits vacation destination Puerto Peñasco.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: As Pati travels with her TV production crew through Mexico’s vast state of Sonora, she’s inspired by the bold flavors and ingredients. They stop at a hacienda outside of Hermosillo, where Pati prepares her take on a true Sonoran feast.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati is inspired by Sonora’s 'northern flavors' where the hot, arid desert lends itself to hearty and surprising recipes. She makes traditional tamales with corn, chiles, & cheese, and then for the main course, pork chops topped with pickled grape salad.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Iron Chef Sakai takes on Mitsuru Saito in an all-out battle of beef.

programme.title: Iron Chef

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Hugo decide ser inducido por el doctor Von Shirak a un estado cataléptico para experimentar si el medicamento funciona, en medio su transición, él sueña que ayuda a Soledad y a su bebé.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: El dolor y los celos colman a Verónica. La nueva patrona admite que sus sentimientos por el mayor de los Beltrán perduran. Patricia le confiesa a Verónica su pasión. Irene critica a su madre por adúltera y Antonia también la desacredita en público.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Alejandro visita a la Patrona, pero ella lo rechaza. Ramiro echa a Prudencia de su casa y Julio ya no la quiere; en la calle todos señalan a la adúltera. Constanza sufre por su hijo y pone en riesgo el plan. Verónica convoca a los Lobos a su casa.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Prudencia muere a mano de los Lobos, pero antes tiene un encuentro con Verónica. Gertrudis y Lucas participan en el plan para acabar con la madre de Patricia. Alejandro le reclama a su madre por vigilarlo. Antonia invita a Max a vivir en la casa.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Lucas siente miedo y culpa tras matar por primera vez a una persona. Verónica reacciona con absoluta frialdad ante la noticia de la muerte de Prudencia. Ricardo consuela a Patricia por su pérdida. Maximiliano y Valentina tienen un encuentro íntimo.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Cansada de la agitada vida nocturna de su esposo, Gabriela se sincera con Sara, quien decide vigilar de cerca a Fernando y lo sigue hasta las pesebreras, donde tiene una cita con su amante.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Sara le cuenta a su madre delante de Martín lo que vio y juntas van tras Fernando hasta una casa, donde reconocen en la oscuridad a su amante, Gabriela pide un arma y discute con su hija.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela echa a Fernando de la hacienda, pero Dínora irrumpe en su habitación por la noche y amenaza con matar a Sara si no la obliga a marcharse de la hacienda, Malcolm y Carmela se ríen.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Delante de Fernando, Gabriela echa a Sara de la hacienda y le dice que ha decidido quedarse sola con su esposo. Norma tiene un mal presentimiento mientras Dínora vigila día y noche a su presa.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Hugo decide ser inducido por el doctor Von Shirak a un estado cataléptico para experimentar si el medicamento funciona, en medio su transición, él sueña que ayuda a Soledad y a su bebé.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Hugo regresa para salvar a Soledad y a su supuesta sobrina, quien puede sufrir de catalepsia. El espectáculo de la dama misteriosa es todo un éxito, mientras Arturo está por casarse con Eloísa.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Soledad le pide ayuda al doctor Von Shirak para tener a su bebé, pero Max tiene sus planes. Los Burke complican las cosas para Hugo, cuando Arturo piensa que Alcides está vivo.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Hugo recibe a Aurora en sus brazos, impide que el doctor Max se quede con la bebé para sus propósitos, pero le miente a Soledad. Paquito anuncia que Alcides está vivo, pero tiene sus dudas.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: El dolor y los celos colman a Verónica. La nueva patrona admite que sus sentimientos por el mayor de los Beltrán perduran. Patricia le confiesa a Verónica su pasión. Irene critica a su madre por adúltera y Antonia también la desacredita en público.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: There is a neighborhood burglar on the loose, and Morticia has reason to believe it could be Gomez. Morticia decides to probe his subconscious mind for a key to his criminality after she and Uncle Fester discover loot hidden in the storeroom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The eight remaining teams depart the Pit Stop at Estancia Fortin Chacabuco in Bariloche, Argentina for Hamburg, Germany.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The eight remaining teams are transported from the Pit Stop at the Indra Club in Hamburg, Germany's red-light district to a mystery location in France.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The seven remaining teams drive from the Pit Stop at the Church of Massiges in Verdun, France to Reims.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The six remaining teams depart the Pit Stop in Champagne Ardenne, France and fly to the Seychelles.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The six remaining teams depart the Pit Stop on the Seychellian island of Praslin and fly to Penang, Malaysia, heading to the Snake Palace.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The five remaining teams depart the Pit Stop at the Pinang Peranakan Mansion in Penang, Malaysia and head to Singapore, where they learn that a U-Turn awaits.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The four remaining teams depart the Pit Stop at Marina Barrage in Singapore and fly to Shanghai, China.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The four remaining teams depart the Pit Stop at the Shanghai Science and Technology Museum, with Louie and Michael knowing a Speed Bump awaits them.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Brent and Caite, Jet and Cord, and Dan and Jordan leave Shanghai and head to San Francisco and the finish line.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: This season's racers are introduced and for the first time in the history of The Amazing Race, the team to finish in first place will be awarded a surprise, game-changing advantage.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: One team considers using their precious Express Pass after playful Ghanaian locals give some teams a headache while they struggle to complete the high-stakes roadblock.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: A challenging detour tests one couple's relationship, while another team's Racer requires medical attention, threatening their position in the competition.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: After teams volunteer at a local school in Ghana, THE AMAZING RACE makes it's first-ever trip to the Arctic Circle, where one couple finds themselves in an unfortunate position and contemplate making a game changing decision.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: A vegetarian racer struggles with a difficult decision when faced with a Norwegian delicacy, and Teams face their fears of heights during a gut-wrenching Roadblock.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jungle Jack travels to a special animal rescue center in the jungles of Costa Rica, and encounters creatures around every corner. Caiman, Toucan, Iguanas, Howler Monkeys and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and Suzi head deep into South Africa's Addo National Park to learn more about its famous Elephant population, and the rest of the Big Seven that call Addo home.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Loango National Park in Gabon is often called Africa's Last Eden. Come along with Jack and his family as they explore the untouched wilderness, encountering Forest Elephants, Forest Buffalo, an injured Sea Turtle and the wildest beach on the planet!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack and Sue as they head to the southern tip of Chile to explore the untamed region of Patagonia! The land beneath the towering Andes Mountains is home to Condors, Guanacos, and some of the most beautiful Glaciers in the world.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack is heading to his home state of Tennessee! He meets a one-of-a-kind farm animal living life to the fullest with a prosthetic leg, and a dedicated caregiver who's helping loads of native species get a second chance.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: On a camel trek in Israel, Jack learns first hand about the animal's unique physiology and important contribution to early trade. Later, Jack visits the International Camel Center.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: It's a Colorful Life
programme.desc: Wild animals flaunt their colors for all sorts of reasons: to send a warning, to attract a mate and sometimes, it’s just something they ate! Today, Jack is counting down seven amazing animals that aren’t shy about showing their true colors.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: At Home on the Range
programme.desc: Today, Jungle Jack saddles up for a farm fresh countdown! Donkeys, musk ox, camels, and all sorts of barnyard fun is in store as Jack travels to ranches and farms from North and South America to the Middle East.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: While in Barro Colorado, a dense forested island in Panama, Jack goes in search of a Harpy the world's largest eagle. The island is home to the famed Smithsonian Tropical Research Institute.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Going the Distance
programme.desc: Jungle Jack counts down nature’s long-distance animal athletes!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: This adventure has Jungle Jack written all over it! Join in as we head deep into the Peruvian Amazon Rainforest get a rare look at Giant River Otters, Pre-Historic Birds, Caimans and much more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and Suzi discover beekeepers working to protect the forest, and Jack meets the sacred cows of Rwanda.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Rebounding
programme.desc: Meet six amazing animals rallying from the brink of extinction. Bald eagles, American alligators, Florida manatees, Peregrine falcons and more.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Big cats, gigantic spiders, killer reptiles, stealthy raptors… whether they pack poison, jaws or claws, all of today’s creatures are deadly in their own way.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Today Jack is traveling to visit Terri, Bindi and Robert Irwin and see first-hand how Steve's dream turned into a reality as the Hanna family meets up with the Irwin family at the Australia Zoo. They see Sumatran tigers, elephants, and crocodiles!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he explores some of his favorite beaches and meets the animals that live there, like Sea Turtles, Sea Lions, and loads of other marine life!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Animal Adaptations
programme.desc: From the Arctic to the desert, animals have found a way to survive and thrive in every eco-system on the planet. Join Jack as he’s counting down ten amazing animal adaptations.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Check out this adventure to the Atacama Desert in Chile, where Jack searches for wildlife in the most unlikely of places, and gets a first-hand look at what it's like to live in this harsh yet beautiful environment.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he braves the waters of Botswana's Okavango Delta! The world's largest inland delta provides a beautiful home to thriving wildlife like Crocs, Hippos, and Elephants.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Wildlife Crime-Fighters
programme.desc: Jungle Jack is heading to the frontlines witnessing conservation and anti-poaching efforts in action around the world all to help save threatened and endangered species. Rhinos, elephants, primates and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Top Predators
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack for six ravenous encounters with mighty carnivores at the top of the food chain. Grizzly bears, Nile crocs, lions, African wild dogs, tiger sharks and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and Suzi explore South Africa's Thula Thula reserve, known for its heartwarming work saving African elephants.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: On the Caribbean Island of Dominica, Jack climbs up Morne Diablotin in search of the Sisserou, the world's most endangered parrot. Jack also encounters a large Boa Constrictor, then tries to keep pace with a “mountain” chicken.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack is heading to the island-nation of Curacao for some quality time with its winged residents. From fearless flying Bats, and powerful Ostrich to pretty-in-pink Flamingos.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Does having a big brain mean you’re the smartest? Find out on today’s countdown as Jungle Jack meets the biggest brainiacs of the animal kingdom, like dolphins, elephants, dogs, sperm whales, chimpanzees and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Once known as the breadbasket of Africa, Zimbabwe is home to some of the most iconic wildlife on the continent. But, drought, poaching, and a lack of resources have left many species fighting for survival.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack heads to Africa and the front lines of this growing threat to see what can be done to save the rhino from extinction. Jack meets the conservationists who are fighting back using every possible option.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Two shy people keep missing each other, due in part to Gopher's interference; two residents of old folks home take a cruise, only to be followed by their meddling children.

programme.title: The Love Boat

programme.title: The Love Boat

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: At a crime scene, anything left behind or seemingly out of place is considered a clue. But a fire can extinguish everything in its path –challenging forensic investigators at every turn and making each arson a trial by fire.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Lies and deceit can often throw investigators off the trail of justice. But when hard evidence contradicts a killer's story, police must use the clues to piece together the truth.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: CI: Coroner Investigator will reveal the most in-depth look to date into the science of death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: DNA analysis overturns the convictions of three men who have spent years behind bars, paying for crimes they did not commit.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: They say that a burden shared is a burden halved, but when partners team up to commit murder, the weight of their guilt remains just as heavy. Investigators must rely on forensic science to capture partners in crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic Botany & Geology: Plants help provide oxygen and nutrients for existence. Soil is the fertilizer of life. Yet both can yield clues to the time and location of a person's death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Time of death is an important consideration in a murder investigation, but when a killer freezes, burns, or grinds his victim, even the most skilled medical examiner would be at a loss about how to calculate it.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Poison is the subtlest form of death, and investigators must see through unusual circumstances to bring these murders to light.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Missing Person: Approximately 1.8 million Americans are reported missing each year. Worldwide, the number of missing persons nearly triples.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In San Diego, California, a killer has left behind pieces of evidence. Detectives must sort through these small clues to prove murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Tool marking: A tool used to commit a crime can often be the same tool used to solve it. The pattern a machine leaves on an item, the unusual way a tool crimps a wire, and even something as innocuous as the shape of a wood chip can lead to a killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Killers often attempt to deflect attention away from their crimes by hiding the remains of their victims. Bodies may lay hidden for years before they are discovered.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In Columbus, Ohio, a woman is found shot in the head. The death is ruled a suicide, but something is not right and detectives refuse to let the matter rest.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Men don't have a monopoly on murder, but it's still extraordinary when women kill. Though female killers are as deadly as males, they choose less violent methods.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.desc: The group must contend with a new set of issues while out on a mission, and must push through to survive.
